title: Message by the Treasurer – Lahore Garrison University
text:
Message by the Treasurer – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Message by the Treasurer
LGU
2023-01-23T05:59:22+00:00
Message by the Treasurer
The Treasurer is the officer managing property, finances and investments of the university and the secretary of the Finance and Planning Committee, The Treasurer’s office is a full-time position at the Lahore Garrison University. This office provides accounting , financial reporting, financial plaining to senior management ,BOG, External & Internal stakeholders ( faculty, administrative staff, and students,vendors), ensuring transparency, a timely and effective reporting system. The Treasurer’s office manages funds, assets and liabilities, income, and expenditures of the University. The Office assists the Vice-Chancellor in all financial matters. Furthermore, the office ensures transparency in pecuniary matters. The Treasurer office also handles the matters regarding student funds, scholarships, salary, and internal as well as external audit of the University.
Mr. Fida Muhammad Khan
Treasurer

title: About Us – Lahore Garrison University
text:
About Us – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
About Us
LGU
2026-05-06T16:51:18+00:00
OUR VISION
An inclusive university nurturing skilled professionals and responsible citizens.
OUR MISSION
To foster an open and supportive educational environment that produces graduates who can innovate as entrepreneurs and serve as responsible citizens through transformative learning, industry collaboration and a commitment to sustainability.
CORE VALUES
Innovation
Excellence
Empathy
Discipline
Integrity
Inclusivity
Attitude of Gratitude
Team Building
6040
Students
1075
Courses
366
Faculty
1
Campus
Message by the Vice Chancellor
The long-term growth and sustainable development of nations highly depend on the professional excellence of its individuals. Human resources can perform excellently only if their capabilities are developed, continuously upgraded, and they are sufficiently motivated to work both individually and collectively for the welfare of society. This can only occur in the presence of an inclusive, vibrant, dynamic, and competitive higher education system that meets both national and international standards of excellence and practice. Universities’ contributions go beyond traditional academic roles, profoundly impacting economic, social, and environmental dimensions.
Lahore Garrison University (LGU) envisions a research-driven and demand-oriented future by providing quality education to ensure a sustained supply of talented graduates with strong leadership and entrepreneurial skills. Our university takes pride in fostering strong character development grounded in ethical and moral values. The diversity and depth of our academic programs, along with the multidisciplinary nature of our applied research, inspire creative, imaginative, and innovative insights that offer solutions to real-world problems. We are committed to making a meaningful impact by heavily investing in academic, research, and innovation programs that benefit society, drive economies, promote sustainable growth, and contribute to comprehensive societal development.
The faculty at LGU is highly qualified, experienced, and dedicated, consistently striving to create a student-centered learning environment through creative pedagogy. The institute features exceptional infrastructure facilities conducive to higher teaching-learning environments and research. We are committed to building strong collaborations with industry and academic institutions, both nationally and internationally, to enhance our research and innovation capacities. These efforts not only enrich the learning experience for our faculty and students but also provide opportunities for active participation in real-world projects, offering invaluable hands-on experience.
I warmly invite you to join us on this thrilling voyage of education, exploration, and creativity.
Maj Gen Muhammad Khalil Dar, HI(M) (Retd)
LEADERSHIP

title: Academic Branch’s Functions – Lahore Garrison University
text:
Academic Branch’s Functions – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Academic Branch’s Functions
LGU
2025-03-25T11:48:01+00:00
Functions of directorate of Academic Affairs Office:
Coordinates with faculties and departments on all academic matters to ensure smooth operations.
Monitors class activities through regular class inspections, ensuring effective delivery of lectures.
Plans and executes Faculty Development Programs (FDPs) for faculty and associated staff to enhance professional growth.
Develops and implements academic timetables in accordance with HEC criteria, ensuring proper scheduling.
Updates semester rules and regulations for all academic departments to maintain quality education standards.
Liaises with HEC, PHEC, HED and other government bodies to implement academic policies related to curriculum development, admission processes and enrollment regulations.
Coordinates with stakeholders to formulate policies, including Admission Policy, Financial Assistance Policy, Plagiarism Policy, FDP Policy, and Timetable Policy.
Facilitates university governance meetings, including Academic Council Meeting (ACM), Board of Advanced Studies and Research (BASR), Deans and HoDs to ensure structured decision-making.
Supervises examination policies, grading systems, and assessment methods, maintaining transparency and academic integrity.
Issues academic notifications ensuring timely documentation and compliance.
Maintains academic records and curricula, aligning them with national and global education benchmarks.
Organizes and supports academic events, including convocations, seminars, and workshops as per the university’s academic calendar.
Ensures effective student academic support, including admissions, enrollments, transfers and graduation requirements.
Drives institutional growth, research excellence, and quality education through strategic leadership and policy implementation.
Supports academically weak students through remedial programs and mentorship.
Monitors faculty and student performance to ensure continuous improvement.

title: Accounts Internal Audit – Lahore Garrison University
text:
Accounts Internal Audit – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Accounts Internal Audit
LGU
2025-02-12T07:44:49+00:00
Message:
Office of the Internal Auditor of Lahore Garrison University ensures the effective monitoring of internal controls, compliance with policies, and safeguarding of university resources. This office is responsible for internal audit to ensure accuracy, transparency, and accountability in financial matters. This office is also serving as an advisor to senior management of the university. The Internal Auditor works to identify risks, recommend improvements, and maintain the financial integrity of the institution. The office collaborates with various stakeholders, including faculty, staff, and external auditors, to uphold the highest standards of financial governance.
Director Internal Audit
Muhammad Naveed

Dr. Iqra Zubair | Dr. Iqra Zubair spoke at the VI International Conference on Catalysis and Chemical Engineering:Dr. Iqra Zubair Awan, Assistant Professor at the Department of Chemistry, presented her research paper at the VI International Conference on Catalysis and Chemical Engineering (22-26thFebruary 2022), held in San Francisco, California, USA. Dr. Iqra’s research paper discussed the catalytic fractionation of biomass to obtain functional aromatic. The conference had 982 presentations and 1873 attendees from all over the world.Dr. Iqra Zubair selected to join the 71stLindau Nobel Laureate Meeting:Dr. Iqra Zubair is one of the 6 young scientists of Pakistan who have been selected to join the 71stLindau Nobel Laureate Meeting (to be held from 26 June – 1stJuly 2022 in Lindau, Germany). She has passed the competitive selection process in which applications are evaluated by the scientific review panel of the Council for the Lindau Nobel Laureate Meetings. Dr. Iqra is among the 611 young scientists from across the world who are given the opportunity for a week of scientific exchange with around 30 Nobel Laureates in person.

title: Admission Criteria for Department of Biology – Lahore Garrison University
text:
Admission Criteria for Department of Biology – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Admission Criteria for Department of Biology
LGU
2025-01-30T14:43:07+00:00
ADMISSION CRITERIA FOR DEPARTMENT OF BIOLOGY
Admission Requirements for BS Programs
12 years education (FSc Pre Medical or Equivalent Certificate).
Minimum 50 % marks.
Admission Requirements for MPhil Programs
BS/BSc (Hon)/MSc in the fields of Biological sciences / Life sciences / Animal sciences / Medical sciences / Pharmacy / Vet Sciences or equivalent from any recognized national or international institution.
16 years of education. Minimum CGPA 2.5 out of 4, 50% marks / 2nd Division and in accordance with instructions issued from time to time by HEC.
GRE GAT (General) minimum 50 % marks or Test conducted at par with GRE in accordance to instructions issued by HEC. Minimum percentage requirement is 60%.
Interview conducted by admission committee.
Admission Requirements for PhD Programs
MS / MPhil in the fields of Biological sciences / Life sciences / Animal sciences / Medical sciences / Pharmacy / Vet Sciences or equivalent from any recognized national or international institution.
Minimum CGPA 3.0 out of 4, 60 % marks / 1st Division and in accordance with instructions issued from time to time by HEC.
GRE GAT (Subject) minimum 60 % marks or Test conducted by the university at par with GRE in accordance to instructions issued by HEC. Minimum percentage requirement is 70 %.
Interview conducted by admission committee.

title: MSAI Admission Eligibility and Selection Criteria – Lahore Garrison University
text:
MSAI Admission Eligibility and Selection Criteria – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
MSAI Admission Eligibility and Selection Criteria
LGU
2025-01-13T19:40:50+00:00
Admission Eligibility and Selection Criteria:
⦁
Basic Academic Qualification:
Sixteen years of education or a BS degree in SE/CS/IT/EE/CE (4-year programme with a minimum of 120 credit hours) after HSSC/F.A./F.Sc./Grade 12 or an equivalent qualification in a relevant subject, with at least 50% marks or a minimum CGPA of 2.5 on a 4.0 scale, shall be required for admission to the MSAI programme.
⦁
Admission Test and Interview:
GRE/GAT/HAT-General or University Admission Test, with a minimum cumulative score of 50%, is required for admission to the MSAI programme. The GAT test score is valid for a period of two years. Additionally, candidates must achieve at least 50% marks in the interview.
⦁
Interdisciplinary Qualification:
The university may recommend 3-9 CH deficiency courses of level 6 courses, after considering the educational background and knowledge of the candidate. Deficiency courses shall be determined by the Admission Committee, before admitting the student.

Call For Papers
AI2CF 2026 focuses on interdisciplinary research and practical applications of AI technologies across:
Cybercrime detection and investigation
Digital and multimedia forensics
Financial crime, fraud detection, and AML
Cybersecurity, network security, and cloud security
Smart policing and intelligent surveillance systems
The conference also addresses ethical, legal, and social implications (ELSI) of AI in criminal justice, along with emerging technologies such as blockchain, IoT, cloud, and mobile forensics, and capacity building for students and professionals.
Topics of Interest (but not limited to)
AI & Cybersecurity
AI-based threat and intrusion detection
Malware analysis using ML/DL
Data Network, cloud, and information security
Predictive analytics and cyber risk assessment
Cybercrime & Digital Forensics
AI-assisted cybercrime investigation
Digital evidence handling and preservation
Incident response and forensic readiness
Mobile, IoT, and cloud forensics
OSINT, social media intelligence, and dark web analysis
Financial Crime & Blockchain Forensics
Fraud detection and financial crime analytics
Cryptocurrency and blockchain forensics
AI-based AML and compliance systems
Smart Policing & Criminal Intelligence
Smart and predictive policing
Criminal profiling technologies
Intelligent surveillance systems
Ethics, Privacy & Governance
Ethical AI and responsible use
Privacy-preserving AI techniques
Data protection, governance, and regulation
Field of Interest
Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
Cybersecurity and Information Assurance
Digital Forensics and Incident Response
Cybercrime and Financial Crime Investigation
Communication and Networking Systems
Blockchain and Distributed Ledger Technologies
Cloud, IoT, and Mobile Computing Security
Smart Systems and Intelligent Surveillance
Ethical AI, Privacy, and Digital Governance
Paper Submission
Papers must present
original, unpublished research
.
Manuscripts must follow the
IEEE Conference Paper Format
.
All accepted and presented papers will be submitted to
IEEE Xplore®
, subject to IEEE quality standards.
The conference follows a rigorous peer-review process in accordance with
IEEE ComSoc policies
.

title: Award of Degree and Completion Time – Lahore Garrison University
text:
Award of Degree and Completion Time – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Award of Degree and Completion Time
LGU
2025-01-13T05:35:39+00:00
Award of MSCS Degree:
For the award of MSCS degree, candidates shall:
i. Either need to complete 30 credit hours of course work OR
ii. Complete 24 credit hours of coursework along with a minimum of six (6) credit hours for research work/thesis.
iii. Obtained a CGPA of 2.5 or more.
Degree Completion Timeline:
i. The MSCS degree shall be awarded by the universities not before the completion of 2.0 years or four (04) regular semesters and not after completion of four (04) years or eight (08) regular semesters, save exceptions mentioned below.
ii. In case a student is unable to secure an MS within 2 years than ask for extension in duration, the university may constitute appropriate authority and determine the causes of delay. In the event of force majeure (i.e., delay on account of circumstance beyond the control of student), the university may grant an extension in the period of award of MS degree in accordance with the duration limiting factor(s) and shall also take corrective measures in case the delay is caused by process or administrative reasons.

title: Bachelor of Science in Physics Road Map – Lahore Garrison University
text:
Bachelor of Science in Physics Road Map – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Bachelor of Science in Physics Road Map
LGU
2025-01-26T16:53:49+00:00
Bachelor of Science in Physics
OVERVIEW
Physics is the natural science of matter involving the study of matter, its fundamental constituents its motion and behavior through space and time, and the related entities of energy and force. Physics is one of the most fundamental scientific disciplines, with its main goal being to understand how the universe behaves. A scientist who specializes in the field of physics is called a physicist.
Objectives and Program Outcomes
Program Mission:
To produce competent physicists with excellent knowledge who are capable to apply practical skills in different areas of physics for employment and higher education through providing curriculum based on liberal arts education to ensure greater breadth of knowledge along with in-depth knowledge of physics by offering an opportunity to learn and experience various aspects of physics under one roof.
Program Objective:
The BS Physics program objectives are to:
To ensure that the undergraduate education focuses not only on the main field of specialization but also provides exposure to the interdisciplinary areas of knowledge.
To promote application of academic knowledge to effectively respond to real life, entrepreneurial and industry challenges and requirements.
To equip students with the sense and ability to demonstrate creativity, curiosity, exploration and reflective problem solving.
Program Outcomes:
Organize and carry out solutions to long, complex physics problems.
Function effectively both as a leader and as a member of project teams.
Decide on strategies to be used and assumptions that need to be made.
Determine what constitutes sufficient evidence for a conclusion.
Teamwork:
Ability to function effectively in multidisciplinary teams
Eligibility Criteria
12 years education i.e. FSc Pre Medical or FSc Pre Engineering or ICS (Physics & Mathematics) or Equivalent Certificate.
14 years education, BSc (2 years) or ADP or Equivalent Certificate for admission in 5th semester.
Minimum 45% marks.
Gap Period-3 years (Relaxation can be given if needed).

Course load per Semester: 15-18 Cr.Hrs
Total Credit Hours: 132
Semester: 8
Semester duration: 16-18 weeks

2025-01-27T16:50:50+00:00
Bachelors of Science in Chemistry
Program Vision
Produce skilled and creative graduates in the field of Chemistry having strong commitment to social, ethical, and scientific values.
Program
Mission
The program will produce proficient Chemistry graduates having deep conceptual and applied knowledge, strong ethical and national values, and sound professional and interpersonal attributes.
Program Objectives
Educate students about the fundamental concepts of Chemistry to effectively plan and execute applied research.
Instill ethical and social values in students to responsibly conduct Chemical Sciences research for national socio-economic development.
Promote effective communication and interpersonal skills to develop academia–industry Bridge.
Program Learning Outcomes
Students shall be able to comprehend the core concepts of Chemistry along with other related fields.
Students shall have the capabilities to apply their skills and knowledge to the Chemical sector in an ethical and responsible manner.
Students shall have the potential to explore and critically analyze real-world problems and offer solutions using Chemistry knowledge.
Students will be able to develop scientific culture and demonstrate professional skills in different vistas of life and contribute to national progress.

12 years education (FSc Pre Medical, Pre Engineering or Equivalent Certificate)

title: Biology Department HODs Message – Lahore Garrison University
text:
Biology Department HODs Message – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Biology Department HODs Message
LGU
2026-05-19T09:23:14+00:00
HOD’s Message
Welcome to the Department of Biology at Lahore Garrison University, where we offer a multidisciplinary approach to education, combining fields such as Microbiology, Biotechnology, and Human Nutrition & Dietetics. Our programs emphasize experiential learning and problem-solving, preparing students for successful careers in the biological sciences.
We offer BS, MPhil, and Ph.D. programs designed to equip students with the skills needed to address real-world challenges in health, agriculture, and the environment. By integrating AI into our curriculum, we enhance students’ analytical abilities and ensure they stay current with emerging trends. As biology forms the foundation of many AI applications, our students gain a unique perspective on how biological principles can drive advances in artificial intelligence and data-driven research.
Our faculty, including both local and foreign-qualified experts, creates an inclusive and dynamic learning environment aligned with global Sustainable Development Goals (SDGs). We encourage students to explore, innovate, and contribute to solving global challenges, particularly in the fields of human nutrition and dietetics.
Join us on this journey of discovery and impact.
Warm regards,
Dr. Hafiz Zeshan Wadood
Head of the Department, Biology
Lahore Garrison University

BS Computational Physics and Data Science

2024-11-20T05:59:38+00:00
BS Computational Physics and Data Science
BS Computational Physics and Data Science
Course Duration: 4 Years
Total Credit Hours: 135
Semester: 8
Apply Now
Download Prospectus
Download Fee Structure
Introduction
This program blends physics with computational techniques and data science to solve complex problems in various domains. The graduates will equip with computational tools and data analysis skills to excel in careers across research, industry and technology.
Program Vision
To lead in integrating physics and data science, producing graduates who drive innovation in computational research and data-driven science.
Program Mission
To equip students with a solid foundation in physics, computer and data science. Our goal is to develop critical thinkers and problem solvers capable of addressing real-world challenges and contribute to advancements in science and technology.
Program Objectives
The BS Computational Physics and Data Science objectives are to:
Equip students with a comprehensive understanding of physical principles and advanced computational skills.
The program integrates rigorous physics coursework with training in data science, programming and computational modeling, preparing graduates to solve complex problems in science, technology, and industry.
The program promotes analytical thinking, problem-solving abilities, and technical proficiency, enabling students to thrive in interdisciplinary fields.
Program Time Duration
Duration:4 years
Semester duration: 16-18 weeks
Semesters: 8
Course load per Semester:15-18 Cr.Hrs
Eligibility Criteria
12 years education i.e. F.Sc (Pre Engineering & Pre Medical) or ICS (Physics, Mathematics, Statistics) or FA (Computer group) or Equivalent Certificate.
14 years education, BSc (2 years) or ADP or Equivalent Certificate for admission in 5
th
Minimum 45 % marks
Gap Period- 3 years (Relaxation can be given if needed)
Total number of credit hours:  135

title: BS CS Overview – Lahore Garrison University
text:
BS CS Overview – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
BS CS Overview
LGU
2025-02-03T13:04:48+00:00
BSCS – Program Educational Objectives or Program Objectives (PEOs or PO):
The graduates of Computer Science program will have following capabilities/ skills / attributes four years after their graduation.
1. Comprehend the technology-oriented courses, facilitate research, promote new business ideas, and enhance computing solutions development practices.
2. Inculcate presentation and communication skills and create awareness about moral and social values.
3. Apply concepts of various subjects in integration with computing & emerging technologies.
4. Exhibit critical thinking, and problem-solving skills for advancing in higher studies.
Program Learning Outcomes/Graduate Attributes (PLOs/GAs)
Page load link
Go to Top
tables:
PLOs | Description
PLO-1 Academic Education | To prepare graduates as computing professionals.
PLO-2 Knowledge for Solving Computing Problems | Apply knowledge of computing fundamentals, knowledge of a computing specialization, and mathematics, science, and domain knowledge appropriate for the computing specialization to the abstraction and conceptualization of computing models from defined problems and requirements.
PLO-3 Problem Analysis | Identify, formulate, research literature, and solve complex computing problems reaching substantiated conclusions using fundamental principles of mathematics, computing sciences, and relevant domain disciplines.
PLO-4 Design / Development of Solutions | Design and evaluate solutions for complex computing problems, and design and evaluate systems, components, or processes that meet specified needs with appropriate consideration for public health and safety, cultural, societal, and environmental considerations.
PLO-5 Modern Tool Usage | Create, select, adapt, and apply appropriate techniques, resources, and modern computing tools to complex computing activities, with an understanding of the limitations.
PLO-6 Individual and Teamwork | Function effectively as an individual and as a member or leader in diverse teams and in multi-disciplinary settings.
PLO-7 Communication | Communicate effectively with the computing community and with society at large about complex computing activities by being able to comprehend and write effective reports, design documentation, make effective presentations, and give and understand clear instructions.
PLO-8 Computing Professionalism and Society | Understand and assess societal, health, safety, legal, and cultural issues within local and global contexts, and the consequential responsibilities relevant to professional computing practice.
PLO-9 Ethics | Understand and commit to professional ethics, responsibilities, and norms of professional computing practice.
PLO-10 Lifelong Learning | Recognize the need, and have the ability, to engage in independent learning for continual development as a computing professional.

To be successful professionals in the field with solid fundamental knowledge of data science.

To be able to demonstrate comprehensive problem-solving skill set of data science and computing applications for fulfilling the needs of the dynamic global digital economy.
PEO-3:
To be able to apply their skills in computing and data analytics to adapt readily changing environments using the appropriate theory, principles, and processes of Higher Education for the formulation of solutions to real-world problems.
PEO-4:
To utilize and exhibit strong communication and interpersonal skills, as well as professional and ethical principles to analyze and evaluate data, when functioning as a member and a leader of multidisciplinary projects.

title: BS ECONOMICS Roadmap – Lahore Garrison University
text:
BS ECONOMICS Roadmap – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
BS ECONOMICS Roadmap
LGU
2025-08-06T07:02:05+00:00
BS Economics with Data Analytics
BS Economics with Data Analytics
The
BS Economics with Data Analytics
is a cutting-edge, interdisciplinary program that blends rigorous economic theory with advanced data analytics, preparing students to solve real-world problems through evidence-based decision-making. By integrating hands-on learning in data analytical tools, the program empowers graduates to analyse complex economic data, uncover insights, and drive strategic outcomes across sectors like finance, public policy, development, and technology. In an era where data shapes every major decision, this program cultivates a new generation of economists equipped to lead with intelligence, innovation, and impact.
A. Why BS Economics with Data Analytics?
a) Where Critical Thinking Meets Computation
b) Make Smarter Decisions with Data-Driven Insights
c) Launch your career as an Economic Analyst / Data Scientist
d) Explore diverse career paths: (Finance, Banking, Tech, Policy Research Centers)
e) Integrate AI with Economics
B. Career Paths
a) Economic Analyst
b) Data Analytics (Banking & Firms)
c) Program Analyst (International organizations)
d) Public/Private Sector Economist
e) Market Analyst
f) Academician & Research track
C. Key Job Markets
a) Economic Analyst: State Bank, NADRA, PBS, Ministry of Planning and Development, PIDE
b) Data Analytics (Banking): Banks, Insurance firms, Securities firms
c) Data Analytics (Firms): Data Consultant e.g. Dignosco, Rephero Global, Forsight Research
d) Program Analyst (International organizations): UNDP, World Bank, UNICEF, USAID, NGOs
e) Academia & Research: Research Assistant, Ph.D. track
D. Scholarships
1) Intermediate Level Students
2) A-Level Students
E. Scheme of Studies

title: BS Information Technology Road Map 2 – Lahore Garrison University
text:
BS Information Technology Road Map 2 – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
BS Information Technology Road Map 2
LGU
2025-08-26T17:25:54+00:00
Bachelors of Science in Information Technology (NCEAC Accredited)
Creating strong foundations in the discipline of information technology is the main focus of the BSIT programme in the Lahore Garrison University. Concepts are elaborated with theoretical and practical implementations to produce students who are competent in problem-solving and computing methods. The programme meets all the emerging demands of the software industry and is approved by the Higher Education Commission (HEC) of Pakistan.
The BSIT programmes offers a wide range of courses helping the students in acquiring expertise in computer applications, modern theoretical aspects of computer science, programming techniques and efficient utilization of technology. Students will participate in seminars, workshops as well as competitions to ensure that they keep up the latest trends in the field. The programme ensures highly skilled graduates who are equipped with the required knowledge to lead a successful career in the field of computer science and contribute to the technical community.

title: BSCS Admission & Eligibility Criteria – Lahore Garrison University
text:
BSCS Admission & Eligibility Criteria – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
BSCS Admission & Eligibility Criteria
LGU
2026-05-20T08:02:44+00:00
Basic Academic Qualification:
The applicant (male/female) applying for admission in BS (4 years) programs must have secured minimum 50% marks in Intermediate or equivalent degree (12 years education) and having Mathematics is the basic eligibility requirement for admission in all BS programs.
The students who have not studied Mathematics at the intermediate level have to pass deficiency courses of Mathematics (06 credits) in first year, including zero semester.
Candidate with F.A or I.Com Qualification are not eligible.
Admission Test Criteria:
Candidates must appear in the University Admission Test.
Merit will be determined on the basis of aggregate calculated as follows:
10% Matriculation Marks
40% Intermediate Marks
50% Admission Test Marks
Candidates with the highest aggregate scores will be selected for admission to the BSCS program.

title: BTECH HND Overview – Lahore Garrison University
text:
BTECH HND Overview – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
BTECH HND Overview
LGU
2025-02-03T12:32:25+00:00
Programme Overview and Scope:
The Higher National Diploma (HND) in Computing, awarded by Pearson, is a highly regarded qualification that provides students with the essential skills and knowledge required to succeed in the ever-evolving field of computing. The programme is designed to equip students with a broad understanding of computing technologies, methodologies, and practices, making them highly employable in various industries such as software development, IT support, system administration, and more.
The HND in Computing at Lahore Garrison University (LGU) offers a combination of theoretical knowledge and practical skills. The curriculum focuses on key areas like software development, network systems, databases, cybersecurity, and business information systems. Students will have access to state-of-the-art facilities, expert faculty, and resources that foster a dynamic learning environment.
Upon completion of the HND in Computing, graduates have the flexibility to either enter the workforce directly or progress to higher education, such as a bachelor’s degree, through LGU’s established pathways or through international university partnerships.
Programme Objectives:
To Develop Core Computing Skills: Equip students with a solid foundation in computing principles, programming, system design, and network management.
To Prepare for Industry Demands: Provide students with the practical skills and knowledge needed for a range of roles in IT and computing industries.
To Foster Problem-Solving Abilities: Encourage critical thinking and problem-solving skills through project-based learning and real-world scenarios.
To Ensure Professional Development: Prepare students for professional certification exams and future learning, helping them stay competitive in the fast-paced tech industry.
To Promote Ethical and Sustainable Practices: Educate students about the ethical issues, data security, and sustainability challenges in the computing industry.
Learning Outcomes:
Upon successful completion of the HND in Computing, students will be able to:
Demonstrate Technical Competence: Show proficiency in key areas of computing such as programming, software development, database management, and network systems.
Apply Problem-Solving Techniques: Identify and analyze problems in computing systems, applying logical and innovative solutions.
Work Effectively in Teams: Collaborate with peers and professionals to deliver projects in diverse and multidisciplinary teams.
Communicate Professionally: Convey technical concepts clearly and professionally, both orally and in writing, to a range of audiences.
Evaluate Computing Solutions: Assess existing computing solutions and recommend improvements or innovations to enhance performance, security, and scalability.
Understand the Professional Environment: Comprehend the ethical, legal, and societal issues within the computing field, including the importance of data security and privacy.
Develop Continuous Learning Habits: Be equipped with the skills and attitude to engage in continuous professional development and adapt to new technologies.

title: BTECH HND Structure – Lahore Garrison University
text:
BTECH HND Structure – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
BTECH HND Structure
LGU
2025-02-03T12:48:19+00:00
Structure of Pearson BTEC Level 5 Higher National Diploma in Computing:
Requires 240 credits, of which 120 credits are at Level 5 (7 units) and 120 credits are at Level 4 (8 units)
Total qualification time = 2, 400 hours
Total guided learning hours = 960 hours
Mix of core, specialist and optional units, totaling 240 credits
Optional units are selected to make up the remaining credit value
Specialist units can also be selected as optional units for the General pathway, and for any of the specialist pathways
Only one specialist unit is permitted to be used as optional from any given specialist pathway.
After HND:
A Top-Up Year is a one-year program that allows students who have completed a Higher National Diploma (HND) to continue their education and convert their HND qualification into a full Bachelor’s degree (e.g., a BA or BSc). This year typically focuses on more advanced, specialized academic study, and includes independent research or a capstone project, preparing students for higher-level roles in their field or further studies.
Here’s an outline of what the Top-Up Year typically involves:
1. Eligibility: Completion of HND: To qualify for a Top-Up Year, you must have successfully completed an HND in a related field.

title: Career Paths in Chemistry – Lahore Garrison University
text:
Career Paths in Chemistry – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Career Paths in Chemistry
LGU
2025-01-27T18:37:14+00:00
CAREER PATHS IN CHEMISTRY
Drug Designing/ Pharmaceutical Chemistry
Graduates with expertise in computational chemistry skillset will have dynamic career opportunities in pharmaceutical companies, biotech firms, and research labs driving innovations in medicine.
Electric Vehicles/Batteries Management
In the next five years Pakistan is expected to see a significant increase in the production and use of e-Scooters. The total number of electric scooters produced in Pakistan could reach well over 240,000-300, 000units (Tech Explores). Energize Your Career in the Growing World of Electric Mobility!
Computational Modeling
Experts in Computational Modeling & Simulation play a crucial role in scientific research, engineering, and industries by developing virtual models to analyze complex systems, optimize designs, and predict real-world behaviors with high precision.
Data Analyst
A graduate in chemistry/computational chemistry with AI can excel as a data analyst by applying AI driven analytical skills to interpret chemical and environmental data for industries like pharmaceuticals, materials science, and AI-based research.
AI related fields
Professionals skilled in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning have vast career opportunities in tech companies, research labs, and industries focused on automation, data science, and intelligent systems, driving the future of innovation.
Environmental Technology/Energy Sectors
Chemistry graduates can contribute to the environmental technology and energy sectors by developing sustainable materials, optimizing renewable energy processes, and monitoring environmental impacts. Computational chemistry with AI graduates adds value by using predictive models and AI tools to innovate in carbon capture, energy storage, and green technology development.

title: Certificate in Urdu for Foreign Students(CERUF) – Lahore Garrison University
text:
Certificate in Urdu for Foreign Students(CERUF) – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Certificate in Urdu for Foreign Students(CERUF)
LGU
2024-12-05T04:39:42+00:00
Certificate in Urdu for Foreign Students(CERUF)
Certificate in Urdu for Foreign Students(CERUF)
Course Duration: 6 Months
Total Credit Hours: 06
Semester: 1
Apply Now
Fee Structure
Objectives:
The main objectives of CERUF program are:
To develop foundational skills in reading, writing, speaking, and understanding Urdu for effective communication.
To introduce students to the rich cultural and literary heritage of Urdu-speaking communities.
To foster cross-cultural understanding and appreciation through the study of Urdu language and traditions.
To prepare students to use Urdu in real-life contexts, such as travel, social interaction, or professional engagement in Urdu-speaking regions.
Outcomes:
The outcomes of CERUF program include:
Students will be able to engage in simple conversations, understand basic written texts, and express themselves in Urdu, both in speaking and writing.
Students will gain exposure to key aspects of Urdu literature, poetry, and cultural practices, enriching their understanding of the social and historical context of the language.
Students will develop the ability to interact with Urdu speakers with confidence, demonstrating respect for and understanding of cultural nuances.
Students will be able to use Urdu effectively in daily interactions, travel, and professional settings, applying their language skills in real-world contexts.
Semester 1

title: Core Values Department of Mathematics – Lahore Garrison University
text:
Core Values Department of Mathematics – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Core Values Department of Mathematics
LGU
2022-05-16T07:18:23+00:00
Core Values
First and foremost, the Department of Mathematics supports a varied and multicultural learning community that actively participates in fostering the ideas of the liberal arts of critical thinking and lifelong learning to carry out the university’s values. We regard teaching and learning as our greatest priority, while also embracing the value of scholarship and service, to effectively promote these ideals. As a result, we appreciate and encourage a variety of instructional perspectives and approaches, including but not limited to:
Faculty who are well-informed and competent, as well as introspective and evolving as educators.
Innovations in teaching that demonstrate a learning-centered approach to instruction.
Active involvement of students in their learning.
Developing a community of learners among students and faculty.
Broadly defined professional activities that include but are not limited to.
Keeping up with the latest developments in mathematics and mathematics education, as well as contributing to their advancement.
Using mathematics to solve problems in a range of situations.
Centred exploration in the instructing and learning of science at all levels.
Community-oriented exploration with peers and with understudies.
Interdisciplinary scholarship.
Service activities that include but are not limited to
Dynamic interest in accomplishing division, school, and college objectives.
Cooperation with industry, schools, and local gatherings.
Advancing the calling at the nearby, provincial, and public levels.
In every one of these spaces, we additionally esteem kept coaching of all Mathematics Department workforce and staff.
Note that the foremost item in our mission, vision and values statements relates to teaching and student learning. As we map our strategic plan, that frames and directs all of our actions. The ultimate priority of the Department of Mathematics is to provide the best possible learning environment and instruction for our students.
To meet our mission, vision, and values, the Department of Mathematics faces many short and long-term challenges. Among these are:
Providing high-quality instruction and class sizes that allow for student-centered learning and effective student/faculty interaction in the face of increasing enrollments and insufficient numbers of tenure-line faculty;
Diversifying our faculty to provide a variety of viewpoints and ideas and to better reflect our student body and the world around us;
Assuring appropriate opportunities and resources for faculty and students to engage in relevant scholarly activities;
Developing and sustaining programs that meet the needs of our students and community.

Department of Basic Sciences – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Department of Basic Sciences
LGU
2026-02-16T17:49:30+00:00
Faculty
of Basic Sciences
Home
Department of Biology
Department of Chemistry
Department of Mathematics
Department of Physics
Dean’s Message
Welcome to the Faculty of Basic Sciences at Lahore Garrison University — a dynamic hub of academic excellence, cutting-edge research, and innovation. At LGU, our faculty is committed to nurturing future scientists and researchers through a diverse range of undergraduate and postgraduate programs. We proudly offer specialized degrees in Biology (including Microbiology, Biotechnology, and Human Nutrition & Dietetics), Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics — with focused pathways such as BS-Mathematics with Artificial Intelligence, MPhil Mathematics, and PhD Mathematics. Each program is thoughtfully designed to meet industry demands and align with global research developments. Our faculty members bring a wealth of international experience and expertise, ensuring a globally informed teaching and research environment. We are at the forefront of integrating Artificial Intelligence (AI) into the core of our curricula — empowering even BS-level students to engage in AI-based interdisciplinary research. Our department is rapidly positioning itself as a national leader in AI-enabled basic sciences education. Equipped with state-of-the-art laboratories, HEC-accredited programs, and flexible hybrid learning models, LGU provides a vibrant and immersive academic experience. Through our strategic MoU with the Pakistan Kidney and Liver Institute (PKLI), we offer students and researchers valuable opportunities for collaborative research and clinical application. Additionally, our HEC-recognized LGU Journal of Life Sciences serves asan international platform for scholarly contributions. Our graduates are making meaningful impacts in leading organizations both nationally and globally — a reflection of the strong academic foundation and professional grooming they receive at LGU. We remain dedicated to fostering a culture of inquiry, creativity, and inclusivity —shaping the next generation of leaders in science and innovation.
Best wishes,
Prof. Dr. Ashfaq Ahmad
Dean, Faculty of Basic Sciences
Lahore Garrison University

title: Department of Biology – Lahore Garrison University
text:
Department of Biology – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Department of Biology
LGU
2026-02-16T18:26:25+00:00
DEPARTMENT OF BIOLOGY
Overview
Department of Biology is the union of Microbiology, Biotechnology and Human Nutrition and Dietetics. With the mission to strive for scientific excellence, the Department offers various programs with a detailed overview into each area of Microbiology, Biotechnology and Human Nutrition and Dietetics. Department is provided with extensive research facilities to help students in pursuing their research work.
The mission of the Department of Biology coincides with the mission of the Lahore Garrison University. That is to,
Provide quality education with special emphasis on experiential learning and problem-solving.
Department being a blend of arrays of most diversified and emerging fields of Biological Sciences, is committed to developing Scientists, Professionals and Mentors of the future.
Foster an exciting environment loaded with opportunities for Research and Teaching.
Inculcate intellectual virtues of perseverance, determination, and above all, to train youth to feel the responsibility and to stand for the pursuit of the goals despite attendant difficulties till the goals are attained.
Biology itself being the knowledge of life, the Biologists of LGU are one committed cohort of mentors and scientists that will be integrating with the students the sense of curiosity for decoding the mysteries of existence and revealing what is not yet revealed.
We believe that we provide unique teaching and research opportunities through an integrative focus on intra-disciplinary and inter-disciplinary learning. Striving for Excellence by taking on board the emerging disciplines for the compelling learning experience, we want our students to capture a broad-based understanding of contemporary biological issues and pressing problems of today’s world and imbue a critical thinking ability to resolve those challenges. Moreover, at LGU, we strive to encourage diversity among our students and faculty.
There is so much more around us that is yet to be explored, invented and outdone. And we believe we can do it, as we are second to none.

NATIONAL CONFERENCE ON “FRONTIERS IN APPLIED BIOLOGICAL SCIENCE FABS 2023”
DEPARTMENT OF BIOLOGY, LAHORE GARRISON UNIVERSITY – LAHORE
Date: 13-14 December, 2023
Department of Biology, Lahore Garrison University cordially invites you to a two-day conference on
“Frontiers in Applied Biological Sciences FABS 2023”
The event aims to promote and honor scientific contributions spanning in both established and emerging fields of Life Sciences. The conference will encompass broad areas that conform to UN SDGs. This exciting scientific platform will welcome the sharing of robust and innovative findings and perspectives to stimulate scientific dialogue. It will serve as an excellent launching pad for budding students and will provide young researchers with an opportunity to develop a broad scientific attitude.

Overview
The faculty at the moment has only one Department, namely the Department of Chemistry. Apart from teaching, research is a very significant part of the academic activities of this Institute. For effective exploitation of the experience, skills, technical know-how of the teaching staff and to impart training to the students, the following fields of specialization have been developed: Physical Chemistry, Inorganic Chemistry, Organic Chemistry, Analytical Chemical, Biochemistry and Applied Chemistry. Currently, the Department of chemistry offers the following programs M.Phil. (2 Years), BSc (Hons.) (4 years) and PhD (3 – 8 Years).
Department Vision:
To become a leading department for advancement of chemical sciences in academics and research.
Department Mission:
To produce high quality professionals in chemistry equipped with deep modern knowledge, critical thinking and entrepreneurial skills to foster solutions of real-world problems.

Dean’s Message
As the Dean of the Faculty of Computer Science, I am honoured to lead our vibrant community, comprising the departments of Computer Science, Information Technology, and Software Engineering. Our faculty is committed to fostering an environment where innovation, critical thinking, and collaboration thrive. We aim to empower our students to become responsible, ethical, and forward-thinking citizens who will shape the future of technology. Each department brings unique strengths: Computer Science with its foundational theories, Information Technology with its practical applications, and Software Engineering with its focus on building robust, scalable systems. Together, we create a dynamic ecosystem that prepares our students to address global challenges with creativity and integrity.
Our university’s vision of inclusivity and nurturing responsible citizens is at the heart of everything we do. We strive to provide a supportive environment where diverse perspectives are valued, and every individual has the opportunity to excel. Through cutting-edge research, hands-on projects, and industry partnerships, our faculty is dedicated to equipping students with the skills and values needed to lead in an ever-evolving technological landscape. I encourage our students to engage actively with our programs, seize opportunities for growth, and contribute to a culture of mutual respect and innovation. Together, let us continue to build a community that not only advances technology but also upholds the principles of responsibility, inclusivity, and service to society.
Prof. Dr. Atif Chatha
Dean CS/Professor, Lahore Garrison University

title: Department of Computer Science – Lahore Garrison University
text:
Department of Computer Science – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Department of Computer Science
LGU
2026-05-11T16:51:26+00:00
DEPARTMENT OF COMPUTER SCIENCE
HOD’s Message
Welcome! On behalf of the faculty, staff, and students of the Department of Computer Science at Lahore Garrison University, I extend a warm welcome to you. These are exciting times for computer science, as the field is now recognized as a vital source of tools and techniques driving advancements in nearly every aspect of human endeavor. Our students acquire competitive skills in the effective development and application of modern technology. We envision them as exceptional programmers, outstanding researchers, innovative designers, and extraordinary analysts. With rapid advancements in technology, we are committed to equipping you with the advanced competencies necessary to meet the growing demands of science and technology, particularly in computer science, across all professional domains. Our department prioritizes research, resulting in a significant volume of high-impact publications. The Department of Computer Science offers competitive degree programs in fast-evolving fields of study. Our qualified faculty and state-of-the-art facilities ensure you develop a strong technical foundation to apply your knowledge effectively in practical work environments. Recently, the National Computing Education Accreditation Council (NCEAC) of the Higher Education Commission (HEC) of Pakistan awarded our department an ‘X’ category. We encourage you to explore our department’s website. Whether you are a student, parent, alumnus, employer, or colleague, we value your feedback and suggestions, which will help us reach new heights and inspire us to maintain our commitment to excellence.
Dr Muhammad Kashif Siddhu
HOD CS/Assistant Professor,
Lahore Garrison University
OVERVIEW
The computer science department is one of the largest departments of the University offering a range of academic degree programs, including BSCS, MSCS, MSAI, and Ph.D. CS. The department employs a diverse group of faculty members with expertise in various computing disciplines. Research is a significant component of the computer science department. Faculty and students are often engaged in cutting-edge research areas such as artificial intelligence, machine learning, computer graphics, cybersecurity, computer vision, cloud computing, and various allied domains. The department has research labs and faculty members often secure research grants and collaborate with industry. The computer science department has different student societies and clubs such as TechSphere, GEARS, Google Developer Student Club, IEEE Student Branch, and ACM Student Chapter. These groups provide students with opportunities to network, learn, and participate in coding competitions, hackathons, and other extracurricular activities. The department has state-of-the-art facilities, including computer labs equipped with the latest hardware and software as well as specialized equipment for research purposes. Overall, the computer science department plays a vital role in educating the next generation of computer scientists, conducting research to advance the field, and contributing to the development of technology and its applications in various industries.
Department’s Vision:
To be one of the premier Computer Science departments in the region benefitting humanity with its excellence in research, innovation, and entrepreneurship.
Department’s Mission:
To create and impart the latest Computer Science and interdisciplinary knowledge in a way that inspires its students to be ethical lifelong learners, researchers, and innovative problem solvers who strive to improve others’ lives both locally and globally.

We, at the Department of English Language and Literature, strive to produce students who are critical thinkers and researchers. The Department aims at offering courses which would inculcate in the students a practical knowledge of the English language and its literature. Our highly qualified faculty ensures academic excellence. The Department offers undergraduate and graduate programmes.

Department of Humanities & Arts
LGU
2026-03-18T06:31:12+00:00
DEPARTMENT OF HUMANITIES & ARTS
Overview
The Department of Humanities and Arts at Lahore Garrison University was established as a forward-looking academic initiative aimed at fostering interdisciplinary learning and intellectual integration across diverse fields of study. Formed through the amalgamation of the disciplines of International Relations & Political Science, Islamic Studies, and Urdu, the department represents a cohesive academic platform designed to revitalize and reposition these foundational fields within a modern educational framework.
The department was conceived in response to evolving academic and societal needs, particularly the demand for broader, more integrative knowledge systems. It serves as a central academic resource, offering a wide range of general, allied, and interdisciplinary courses to students across various departments of the university.
With a diverse pool of highly qualified specialists, the department contributes significantly to the academic enrichment of students by delivering a comprehensive portfolio of courses. These include Quranic Studies, Pakistan Studies, Ideology and Constitution of Pakistan, International Relations and Current Affairs, and Social Work Practices, alongside a broad spectrum of interdisciplinary offerings such as World History, Introduction to Philosophy, State and Society, Global Governance, Public Policy, Blue Economy, Emerging and Disruptive Technologies, and Comparative Foreign Policies of Great Powers.
Through this diverse curriculum, the department ensures that students develop not only subject-specific knowledge but also a broader understanding of global, societal, and intellectual dynamics essential for navigating the complexities of the modern world.
Vision
To deliver inclusive, interdisciplinary education that develops skilled professionals and responsible citizens through critical inquiry and socially relevant knowledge.
Mission
To foster inclusive, interdisciplinary education that nurtures skilled professionals and responsible citizens through innovation, collaboration, and sustainable, transformative learning.
Core Values
Empathy
Sustainability
Diversity
Inclusiveness

Dean’s Message
Welcome to the faculty of Languages at Lahore Garrison University. The faculty plays a fundamental role in carrying out the vision and mission of a student-centered, research-focused, and service-oriented private institution. We are committed to excellence in education, scholarship and service to provide our students with the knowledge, skills, and support they need, now and in the future. We offer innovative programmes of study utilising active learning approaches that are student-centered and encourage life-long learning. As a community of scholars, we are committed to discovering, communicating, and applying basic knowledge. Education in languages provides essential tools everyone needs to succeed in a complex and rapidly shifting world. We are proud of the education our students receive, with its emphasis on diversity, innovation, technology, and research-based practices. Our faculty members are competent in their ﬁelds and take pride in their quality programmes, high standards and dedication to students. In accordance with the vision and mission of LGU, the Faculty vows to serve the students by harmonising their academic and humanistic values.

DEPARTMENT OF MANAGEMENT SCIENCES
Overview
The Department of Management Sciences was established in 2012, and since then, it has aimed to produce accomplished professionals who are best fit to meet the challenges of the public and corporate world. Our students and faculty are our assets, and we truly value them. They are given the confidence to meet the changing global requirements. Students are given experiential learning opportunities and are provided with hands-on problem solving and decision-making skills. These attributes make all our programs challenging and rewarding.
Students can choose to specialize in the area of their interest with area specialists available to guide them. With our state of the art library, students have access to various research portals through which they can pursue their passion for research.

Department of Mathematics – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Department of Mathematics
LGU
2025-08-23T16:24:01+00:00
DEPARTMENT OF MATHEMATICS
Overview
Mathematics is the science that deals with the logic of shape, quantity, and arrangement. Math is all around us in everything we do. It is the building block for everything in our daily lives, including mobile devices, architecture (ancient and modern), art, money, engineering, and even sports.
Since the beginning of recorded history, mathematics discovery has been at the forefront of every civilized society and in use in even the most primitive of cultures. The need for math arose based on the wants of society: the more complex a society, the more complex the mathematical needs. Primitive tribes needed little more than the ability to count but also relied on math to calculate the position of the sun and the physics of hunting.

Skip to content
Department of Media & Communication Studies
LGU
2026-04-22T08:25:15+00:00
DEPARTMENT OF MEDIA & COMMUNICATION STUDIES
Overview
The Department of Media & Communication Studies has been striving for excellence in the realm of Communication Studies since 2005. The distinguishing kingpin of the department is its literal as well as figurative ‘instrumentality’ devised for practical learning in addition to the essential theoretical academic pursuits. The former is facilitated through state of the art well-structured practical platforms such as Broadcasting house, LGUTV, LGU Radio and LGU Newspaper where students tend to garner firsthand experience of contemporary media practices. Moreover, the Department of Media & Communication Studies also has the distinction of being the official media partner of HEC Educational Channel. Whereas, the theoretical learning is catalyzed through the highly qualified and experienced teaching faculty members who do not only ensure to bring their students at par with the preconceived dimensions of scholarly knowledge but also incite innovative approach among them to append to the existing body of research. It is due to this unique theory-and-practice mix that the graduates from this prestigious department are known for securing instant recruitments in various subfields of Media & Communication Studies including Public Relations, Advertising, Print Journalism, Radio & TV Production and Digital Media.
The Department of Media & Communication Studies offers two academic programs ranging from undergraduate courses to M. Phil. Program. The department also encourages its students to participate in different societies and Media Club of Lahore Garrison University, where their collaborative efforts give vent to quasi-professional team building and team management skills for achieving different productive and progressive goals.
The Department of Media & Communication Studies welcomes all the interested and potential students to be a part of this invaluable experience so that they can ultimately be ushered into the global treads of Media Profession.
Vision:
To be a leading media education center, driving democratic discourse & inclusive socioeconomic progress.
Mission:
To foster a transformative media environment that equips faculty & students with integrated technologies, ethical storytelling skills and democratic mindset, enabling them to collaborate as responsible citizens on real world communication challenges and drive inclusive societal progress.

title: Department of Psychology – Lahore Garrison University
text:
Department of Psychology – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Department of Psychology
LGU
2025-07-02T16:44:24+00:00
Department of Psychology
Overview
Psychology, defined as the scientific study of mind and behavior, is one of the most dynamic and rapidly advancing disciplines, contributing essential insights into human cognition, emotion, and behavior. It plays a crucial role in solving complex societal challenges and enhancing overall human well-being.
The Department of Psychology is committed to delivering exceptional education that extends beyond traditional classrooms, fostering ethical reasoning, academic excellence, and social responsibility. It aims to prepare students to address both local and global challenges effectively.
We offer comprehensive undergraduate and graduate programs including BS Psychology, BS Clinical Psychology, MS Psychology, and MS Clinical Psychology. Students are trained across key specializations such as Clinical Psychology, Counseling Psychology, Organizational Psychology, Health Psychology, Experimental Psychology, Research Methods, and Social Psychology. These programs are designed to ensure theoretical depth, practical competence, and the cultivation of researchers and leaders who promote peace, progress, and societal well-being.
Vision:
Nurture ethically and socially responsible mental health professionals.
Mission:
Prepare psychologists who embody the highest standards of ethical practices, cultural sensitivity, and social responsibility. Our goal is to empower them to provide compassionate, evidence-based mental health services that foster individual well-being, community resilience, and societal advancement through agile teaching methods, applied research, experiential learning, and community service.

title: Department of Psychology HOD’s Message – Lahore Garrison University
text:
Department of Psychology HOD’s Message – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Department of Psychology HOD’s Message
LGU
2026-03-04T05:50:15+00:00
HOD’s Message
On behalf of the Dean SS, Director Academics and the Faculty of the Psychology Department, welcome students to the Lahore Garrison University, a leading institute in the world. Our department has a diverse set of programs: Bachelors in Applied Psychology,Bachelors in Clinical Psychology, ADP in Applied Psychology, and ADP in Clinical Psychology, Masters of Science in Clinical Psychology and Masters of Philosophy in Applied Psychology. Our faculty is highly qualified with sound academic expertise, international exposure and a plethora of research articles published. We boast a highly diversified and motivated student body, equipped with a passion to learn and excel in their fields.
Vision
:
Our aim is to equip students with knowledge on fundamental scientific principles and theories behind behavioural psychology, new-age research techniques and their clinical applications, and fundamentals of ethics and morality in psychology through close collaboration between faculty and students. Our vision is to produce academics and professionals who pioneer ground-breaking research in psychology, not just in Pakistan but also globally.
Mission
Our faculty body, including PhD scholars, is equipped with the latest technical research skills and have collectively published many research papers. Our partnerships with Psychiatry Departments of various hospitals and special education institutions allow our students to learn on-ground clinical assessment skills, diagnostic competencies and the ability to lead therapeutic sessions. Our objective for the Clinical Psychology students is to keep them up-to date with the latest global clinical assessments, therapeutic/treatment procedures and outcomes in mental health. We teach and apply fundamentals of ethics and morality both in psychology and research and make our Bs. AP students professionals in counseling and Ms. CP students in clinical psychology respectively. Our collaborative environment enables our students to improve their mental and physical well-being, and become productive and proactive citizen of the society.
Dr. Nida Zafar
Associate Professor
Chairperson Department of Psychology

Faculty of Social Science
Home

Department of Humanities and Arts
Dean’s Message
It is a great privilege to lead a diverse and dynamic academic community of social sciences. At LGU, we are committed to fostering a robust learning environment that equips our students with the skills and knowledge to excel in the ever-evolving global landscape.
In today’s fast-paced world, the role of social sciences is more critical than ever. Management and social sciences not only shape our understanding of society, politics, and human behavior but also provide the tools to navigate complex challenges. The future of social sciences is intertwined with the integration of cutting-edge technologies such as artificial intelligence (AI) and data analytics. These technologies are transforming industries, and we recognize their importance in preparing our students to thrive in a digitally-driven world. At LGU, we are embedding analytics and AI into our curriculum to ensure that our students are equipped with the analytical skills and technological fluency needed for the jobs of tomorrow.
One of our core objectives is to provide students with international exposure. We are working to establish strong partnerships with leading academic institutions globally, offering students opportunities for exchange programs, internships, and cross-cultural collaborations. This international exposure not only broadens their academic horizons but also prepares them for the diverse challenges and opportunities in a globalized world.
Our faculty members, who are distinguished scholars and practitioners in their respective fields, play a pivotal role in shaping the educational experience at LGU. Their expertise, coupled with our state-of-the-art infrastructure, ensures that our students receive a world-class education. With modern classrooms, advanced laboratories, and cutting-edge digital resources, LGU stands as a beacon of academic excellence.
We also emphasize employability and career readiness. Through our strategic collaborations with industry leaders, internships, and career development programs, we provide students with practical experience and the skills necessary to succeed in today’s competitive job market. Furthermore, our focus on transnational education ensures that our students are not only prepared for local opportunities but are also well-positioned to compete on the global stage.
LGU is committed to fostering an inclusive culture, ensuring access to higher education for all, including those from historically deprived segments of society, and providing them with the opportunities they need to succeed academically and professionally. We are driven by a shared commitment to innovation, excellence, and the holistic development of our students. As we look to the future, we are committed to grow as a responsible institution of higher education, offering a transformative learning experience that is globally relevant, technologically advanced, and deeply rooted in the values of social sciences.
I look forward to collaborating with students, faculty, and stakeholders as we embark on this exciting journey of academic growth and global engagement.
Prof. Dr. Rizwana Bashir
Dean, Faculty of Social Sciences

2025-01-15T10:14:27+00:00
DEPARTMENT OF SOFTWARE ENGINEERING
Overview
Software Engineering at LGU is the second-largest department of the university. It is the discipline of creating high-quality software systems in a systematic, controlled, and efficient manner. It involves the application of engineering concepts, techniques, and methods to the design, development, deployment, and maintenance of software systems. In our software engineering program, we groom professionals who have a mastery of principles, theory, practices, and processes necessary to produce quality software systems. The department has highly qualified faculty members with solid academic backgrounds and rich industry experience who are not only best in teaching but actively promote research culture among the youth of the country.
Vision:
To be a distinguished learning center of software engineering in the region, driving innovation and excellence through collaborative solutions that empower individuals to thrive in an ever-changing digital ecosystem.
Mission:
To provide dynamic learning environment, instill creative thinking, and cultivate entrepreneurial skills so that graduates would be well-rounded professionals to serve the global community.
Our History:
Our department is committed to offering high-tech courses with research-based teaching. We believe that our prudent and responsible course of action during the study in these programs enables the students to improve their skills and to place them for competitive positions in the market. The Department focuses on imparting the knowledge and training which should enable students to harmonize theory with practice, the concept with the application, and the problem with the solution.
Our Societies:
Event Society of Software Engineering (ESSE)

text:
Department of Urdu – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Department of Urdu
LGU
2025-05-16T12:20:24+00:00
1.  عمومی جائزہ
لاہور گیریژن یونیورسٹی، لاہور کا شعبۂ اُردو ان ابتدائی شعبہ جات میں شامل ہے، جنہوں نے یونیورسٹی کے قیام کے فوراً بعد ایم اے اور ایم فل کی تدریس کا آغاز کیا۔ ہائر ایجوکیشن کمیشن پنجاب کی منظوری کے بعد یونیورسٹی نے ترقی کی نئی منازل طے کرنا شروع کیں۔ 2012 میں شعبۂ اُردو نے ایم فل، اور 2016 میں پی ایچ ڈی اُردو کی تدریس کا آغاز ایک نئے عزم اور جذبے کے ساتھ کیا۔ 2024 کے اختتام تک شعبۂ اُردو سے 223 ایم فل اسکالرز اور 79 پی ایچ ڈی اسکالرز عبائے فضیلت زیب تن کر چکے ہیں۔
شعبۂ اُردو نے 2018 میں غیر ملکی طلبہ و طالبات کے لیے سرٹیفکیٹ اور ڈپلوما کورسز کا آغاز کیا، جو اب بھی کامیابی سے جاری ہیں۔ اسی سال دفتری اُردو زبان کا ایک کورس بھی شروع کیا گیا، جس کا مقصد قومی زبان کے فروغ کے ساتھ دفتری امور میں اُردو کو رائج کرنے کے لیے ماہر افرادی قوت تیار کرنا تھا۔
لاہور گیریژن یونیورسٹی، لاہور کا عزم ہے کہ تدریس، تحقیق، اور ایجادات کے ذریعے اپنے طلبہ کو عصرِ حاضر کے چیلنجز سے ہم آہنگ کیا جائے۔ اس مقصد کے تحت شعبۂ اُردو مذکورہ تدریسی اور تحقیقی سرگرمیاں کامیابی سے جاری رکھے ہوئے ہے۔ 2017 میں شعبۂ اُردو نے تحقیقی و تنقیدی جریدے ”نورِ تحقیق“ کا آغاز کیا، جو اب ایچ ای سی کی Y کیٹگری میں شامل ہے۔ اس جریدے کے اب تک 32 شمارے شائع ہو چکے ہیں، جن میں چار خصوصی شمارے بھی شامل ہیں۔
شعبۂ اُردو طلبہ کی ذہنی و علمی نشوونما کے لیے نصابی اور ہم نصابی سرگرمیوں کا انعقاد باقاعدگی سے کرتا رہتا ہے۔ اب تک شعبہ کے زیرِ اہتمام نو قومی و بین الاقوامی کانفرنسز، اُردو تحقیق پر پانچ ورکشاپس، مختلف توسیعی لیکچرز، اور اقبالیات کے فروغ سے متعلق تقریبات منعقد ہو چکی ہیں۔ بی ایس پروگرامز میں اقبالیات کو بطور لازمی مضمون شامل کیا گیا ہے۔
لاہور گیریژن یونیورسٹی میں کئی علمی و ادبی مجالس قائم ہیں، جن میں ”اُردو مجلسِ مباحث“ اور ”اُردو ڈرامیٹک کلب“ نمایاں ہیں، جو طلبہ کی تخلیقی اور فنی صلاحیتوں کو نکھارنے میں اہم کردار ادا کر رہی ہیں۔ ان مجالس کے تحت کئی علمی و ادبی سرگرمیوں کا کامیابی سے انعقاد ہو چکا ہے۔ طلبہ کی تخلیقی صلاحیتوں کو پروان چڑھانے کے لیے شعبہ نے 2014 میں ”العلم“ کے نام سے سالانہ تخلیقی مجلہ کا آغاز کیا، جو اب تک کامیابی سے شائع ہو رہا ہے۔

title: Department of Urdu HODs Message – Lahore Garrison University
text:
Department of Urdu HODs Message – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Department of Urdu HODs Message
LGU
2025-01-27T19:17:40+00:00
صدرِ شعبۂ اُردو کا پیغام
اُردو پاکستان کی قومی زبان اور قومی وحدت کی علامت ہے، جو ملک کے ہر علاقے میں سمجھی، بولی، اور لکھی جاتی ہے۔ موجودہ دور میں اُردو کی مقبولیت میں بے حد اضافہ ہوا ہے، اور یہ ایک عالمی زبان کے طور پر ابھر چکی ہے، جس کے قارئین، سامعین، اور تخلیق کار دنیا بھر میں موجود ہیں۔ اس بڑھتی ہوئی قومی و بین الاقوامی اہمیت کے باعث اُردو زبان و ادب کی تدریس اور تحقیق کا کردار مزید اہم ہو گیا ہے۔
شعبۂ اُردو، لاہور گیریژن یونیورسٹی، اعلیٰ تعلیم یافتہ اور تجربہ کار اساتذہ پر مشتمل ہے، جو تدریس، تحقیق، اور ادب کے میدان میں نمایاں خدمات انجام دے رہے ہیں۔ یہ فیکلٹی طلبہ کو اُردو زبان و ادب کی جدید تحقیق اور بہترین علمی مواد سے مستفید کرنے میں مصروفِ عمل ہے، جو یونیورسٹی کے عزم اور مقاصد کی عکاسی کرتا ہے۔
شعبۂ اُردو کا عزم ہے کہ موجودہ برقی دور میں تدریس اور تحقیق کے ذریعے اُردو کی ترقی و ترویج کو فروغ دے اور یونیورسٹی کی نیک نامی میں اضافہ کرے۔
ڈاکٹر محمد ارشد اویسی
صدرِ شعبہ اُردو

2025-01-26T15:28:00+00:00
Digital Forensics Research and Service Center
The Digital Forensics Research and Service Center is a center of innovation and collaboration focused on advancing digital forensics. It connects academia, law enforcement, and the private sector to conduct cutting-edge research, real-world case analysis, and develop tools to combat cybercrime. The center offers state-of-the-art facilities and access to the latest technologies for investigating cyber incidents, data breaches, and digital fraud. With an emphasis on education, it equips students, researchers, and professionals with the skills needed to tackle complex challenges in the digital realm. Through global partnerships and interdisciplinary collaboration, the center develops solutions to address emerging threats in cybersecurity and digital forensics.

Center of Excellence
The International Institute of White Collar Crimes Investigation (IIWCCI) is a leading institution focused on combating economic and corporate crimes such as financial fraud, money laundering, and cyber-enabled offenses. IIWCCI offers state-of-the-art training, research, and resources to professionals, law enforcement, and corporate stakeholders. By combining theory with practical skills, the institute equips individuals with the knowledge needed to address the complexities of white-collar crime. With a global network of experts and strategic partnerships, IIWCCI fosters ethical practices, accountability, and transparency, shaping the future of investigators, forensic accountants, and compliance professionals.

DFRSC-Dean’s-Message
LGU
2025-04-22T12:06:24+00:00
Associate Dean’s Message
Department of Criminology
It gives me great pleasure to welcome you to the Department of Criminology, where knowledge meets application in the quest for justice and societal safety. In an era where crime and technology intertwine, our department stands as a beacon of academic rigor and practical expertise, preparing individuals to address modern challenges with skill, integrity, and innovation. Our commitment lies in equipping students with the critical thinking abilities and technical proficiencies required to lead in the dynamic fields of criminology. By fostering interdisciplinary learning, research, and collaboration with national and international agencies, we aim to develop professionals who not only excel academically but also contribute meaningfully to the global fight against crime. I am confident that our department’s dedication to academic excellence, coupled with our innovative research initiatives, will inspire the next generation of leaders and practitioners in these vital disciplines. Together, let us strive to create safer communities and a more equitable society.
Warm regards,
Mr. Kaukab Jamal Zuberi
Associate Dean, Social Sciences LGU.

Associate Dean

Mr. Kaukab Jamal Zuberi
Qualification:
Associate Dean
Kaukab Jamal Zuberi is a prominent figure in the field of digital forensics and cyber security in Pakistan. He serves as the Associate Dean of the Department of Criminology and Forensic Sciences at Lahore Garrison University (LGU) and is the Director of the university’s Digital Forensic Research and Service Centre (DFRSC).
In 2016, Zuberi led the establishment of the DFRSC at LGU, marking it as the first center of its kind in Pakistan. The center focuses on research, training, certification, and degree programs in various fields of digital forensics and cyber security. This center is pioneering efforts to address the growing need for cybersecurity and digital forensics in Pakistan, focusing on training professionals and conducting research to enhance the nation’s cyber capabilities. He aims to prepare experts who can navigate the complexities of digital security in both public and private sectors.
Beyond his academic roles, Zuberi is the founding chairman of the International Association of Digital Forensic Experts (IADFE).
Zuberi has also contributed to discussions on cyber security challenges in Pakistan, highlighting issues such as phone scams, data leaks, and the need for robust data protection laws. He has been actively involved in discussions surrounding critical infrastructure in Pakistan, emphasizing the importance of robust cybersecurity measures to protect national interests. His work includes publishing articles that advocate for better regulatory frameworks in these areas.

title: DFRSC-H.O.D’s-Message – Lahore Garrison University
text:
DFRSC-H.O.D’s-Message – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
DFRSC-H.O.D’s-Message
LGU
2025-04-22T12:05:51+00:00
Head of Department’s Message
Department of Criminology
Welcome to the Department of Criminology, a premier institution dedicated to fostering excellence in education, research, and professional practice. As the Head of Department, I am honored to lead a team of distinguished faculty and staff who share a passion for advancing the understanding of crime and justice. Our department offers a comprehensive range of programs, Our curricula are carefully crafted to equip students with the theoretical knowledge, practical skills, and critical thinking abilities necessary to succeed in their chosen careers. Our department is also well known for its certifications and trainings of digital and forensics. We take pride in our state-of-the-art facilities, cutting-edge research initiatives, and strong industry partnerships. Our faculty members are renowned experts in their fields, with a strong commitment to teaching, research, and community service. As we continue to navigate the complexities of the modern world, the importance of criminology cannot be overstated. Our department is dedicated to producing highly skilled professionals who can make a meaningful difference in the pursuit of justice and the promotion of community safety. Thank you for your interest in the Department of Criminology. I look forward to welcoming you to our community of scholars and professionals.
Sincerely,
Dr. Kausar Parveen
H.O.D. Dept. of Criminology
