title: DFRSC Home – Lahore Garrison University
text:
DFRSC Home – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
DFRSC Home
LGU
2025-04-22T12:01:18+00:00
Overview
Digital Forensics Research and Service Centre (DFRSC) was established in June 2016 as Centre of studies for Digital Forensic and Cyber Crime Investigations at Lahore Garrison University. LGU has made a remarkable impact on the canvas of Digital Forensics and related technologies in last six years. Due to increased demand for our degree programme and keeping in view the emerging trend in the market, a need is recognized to create a new department – “Department of Criminology”. This department will expand the existing faculty, enhance the scope of studies and will offer various new degree programmes to cater the growing demand for quality education in criminology.
Department Vision
To become a leading education provider in the fields of criminology, serving the community, preparing competitive graduates, who can help in decreasing crimes in the society and to take its degree programmes to international market.
Department Mission
Achieve excellence in teaching and research by incorporating the emerging technologies through effective stakeholders’ engagement and to prepare self-driven and competitive graduates.

Diploma in Urdu as Official Language (OLUD)
LGU
2024-12-05T05:34:13+00:00
Diploma in Urdu as Official Language (OLUD)
Diploma in Urdu as Official Language (OLUD)
Course Duration: 06 Months
Total Credit Hours: 09
Semester: 1
Apply Now
Fee Structure
Objectives:
The main objectives of OLUD program are:
To develop students’ ability to effectively use Urdu in official settings, including government, legal, and administrative contexts.
To equip students with knowledge of specialized vocabulary, terms, and expressions commonly used in official Urdu documents, reports, and correspondence.
To prepare students for roles that promote the use and standardization of Urdu as an official language in public institutions, media, and policy-making.
To foster an understanding of how Urdu can be used to preserve cultural heritage while fulfilling its role as a modern official language in diverse sectors.
Outcomes:
The outcomes of OLUD program include:
Students will be able to confidently use Urdu in professional and administrative contexts, including writing reports, letters, and other official documents.
Students will gain proficiency in the specialized vocabulary and terminology used in governmental, legal, and administrative settings, enhancing their ability to navigate official language requirements.
Students will be equipped to play an active role in promoting and standardizing Urdu in official communications and governance.
Students will develop the skills to advocate for the use and preservation of Urdu in public life, contributing to its continued relevance as an official language.
Semester 1

Diploma in Urdu Literature for Foreign Students (DULLFS)
Diploma in Urdu Literature for Foreign Students (DULLFS)
Course Duration: 1 Years
Total Credit Hours: 24
Semester: 2
Apply Now
Fee Structure
Objectives:
The main objectives of DULLFS program are:
To provide students with a comprehensive understanding of classical and modern Urdu literature, including poetry, prose, and major literary movements.
To introduce students to the historical, cultural, and socio-political influences that have shaped Urdu literature and its evolution over time.
To develop students’ ability to critically analyze Urdu literary works, fostering an appreciation for their thematic, stylistic, and linguistic elements.
To enhance students’ understanding of Urdu’s significance in the global literary landscape and its role in fostering cross-cultural dialogue.
Outcomes:
The outcomes ofDULLFS program include:
Students will gain a deep knowledge of key works and genres in classical and modern Urdu literature, enhancing their literary appreciation.
Students will develop a strong understanding of the cultural and historical contexts that have influenced the evolution of Urdu literature, connecting it with broader global literary traditions.
Students will acquire the ability to critically analyze and interpret Urdu literary texts, recognizing their thematic, linguistic, and artistic significance.
Students will be equipped to engage with Urdu literature in a global context, promoting intercultural exchange and understanding of Urdu’s role in world literature.

title: Director Academics’ Message – Lahore Garrison University
text:
Director Academics’ Message – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Director Academics’ Message
LGU
2025-03-25T11:45:31+00:00
Director Academics’ Message
The Office of Directorate of Academic Affairs serves as the backbone of academic excellence, ensuring a seamless and dynamic learning environment. We translate LGU Vision, Mission, Competent Authority’s future plan and key stakeholders’ development initiatives to a workable Strategic Plan. Through continuous coordination with faculties and departments, we oversee all academic matters, ensuring smooth class operations via structured monitoring mechanisms. Our commitment to faculty development is reflected in meticulously planned Faculty Development Programs (FDPs), designed to enhance pedagogical skills and equip faculty with innovative teaching methodologies.
Upholding Higher Education Commission (HEC) standards, we develop, implement, and monitor and classes, ensuring strict adherence to regulatory guidelines. Our role extends to formulating and updating semester rules and academic policies, fostering an ecosystem that supports quality education and institutional growth. We play a pivotal role in organizing key academic events, including convocations and conferences, aligning them with the University’s academic calendar.
To maintain academic integrity and compliance, we liaise with Higher Education Commission (HEC), Punjab Higher Education Commission (PHEC) other government bodies, ensuring the implementation of policies related to curriculum development, education standards, admissions, and student enrolment. Our collaborative approach brings together all stakeholders in shaping various policies such as the Admission Policy, Financial Assistance Policy, Plagiarism Policy, FDP Policy, and Timetable Policy, reinforcing LGU’s commitment to quality education.
The Office of Directorate of Academic Affairs facilitates and conducts University meetings, including Academic Council Meeting (ACM), Board of Advanced Studies and Research (BASR), Board of Studies, Deans and HoDs Committee meetings, providing a structured framework for academic decision-making. We ensure seamless execution of university academic operations including, issue English Proficiency Certificates, and oversee key academic appointments.
Additionally, we maintain comprehensive records of academic curricula, ensuring alignment with evolving educational standards. Through proactive leadership, strategic planning and unwavering dedication, we continue to shape LGU into a distinguished directorate of higher education and intellectual advancement.
I extend my best wishes praying that Allah (SWT) grants us wisdom and success.
Director Academics
Prof. Dr. Arif Jawaid

Welcome to Lahore Garrison University!
It gives me great pleasure to introduce the Quality Enhancement Cell (QEC), an integral part of Lahore Garrison University’s commitment to fostering academic excellence and ensuring the highest standards of education, research, and administration. At QEC, we work tirelessly to uphold and enhance quality benchmarks, ensuring that our students receive an education that empowers them to excel in their professional and personal lives.
Our primary focus is on maintaining academic integrity, strengthening institutional performance, and aligning our programs with the rigorous standards set by the Higher Education Commission (HEC). Through regular self-assessments, academic audits, and feedback systems, we continuously identify areas for improvement to ensure that our programs remain relevant and impactful in today’s fast-evolving world.
At QEC, we believe that quality is not just a goal—it is a continuous journey. We engage with faculty, students, staff, and stakeholders in a collaborative process that emphasizes innovation, accountability, and shared responsibility. Together, we aim to cultivate an environment where knowledge flourishes, ideas are nurtured, and individuals are prepared to contribute meaningfully to society.
Our vision is to position Lahore Garrison University as a leading institution in higher education, known for its commitment to quality and excellence. I invite all members of our university community to join hands in achieving this vision and making a lasting impact on the lives we touch.
Thank you for your continued support and dedication to quality education.

Director SA&C Message
LGU
2026-05-21T07:44:10+00:00
Dear Students,
Assalam-o-Alaikum and Warm Greetings!
As the Director of Student Affairs and Counseling (SA&C), I am excited to be part of your journey towards excellence in education and personal growth. Lahore Garrison University (LGU) is not just a place of learning; it’s a platform for holistic development. We are committed to providing you with an environment that fosters academic achievement, character building, and the acquisition of life skills that will serve you well beyond your years here. Our dedicated faculty, state-of-the-art facilities, and comprehensive support services are all geared towards ensuring that your time in the university is truly transformative.
Our Student Affairs team is here to help you strike that balance between academic pursuits and extracurricular activities. From clubs and societies to sports and cultural events, there’s something for everyone to get involved in. These students-led organizations are the heart and soul of our campus life, offering you the chance to explore your passions, broaden your horizons, and develop skills beyond the classroom.
Our team of experienced counselors offers a safe and confidential space where you can discuss personal, academic, or emotional concerns. We provide guidance, coping strategies, and resources to empower you to navigate through any hurdles that come your way.
I encourage you to take full advantage of the services and opportunities offered by the SA&C directorate. Your active engagement in alumni relations, placement, internship activities, and counseling services will undoubtedly contribute to your holistic growth and a brighter future.
Student Handbook contains valuable information about university policies, procedures, and resources. Let it serve as your guide throughout your time at LGU.
Best wishes for an exceptional academic year ahead!
Mr. Waseem Arshad
Acting Director Student Affairs & Counseling

title: Directorate SA&C – Lahore Garrison University
text:
Directorate SA&C – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Directorate SA&C
LGU
2021-04-14T08:54:46+00:00
Directorate SA&C Overview
The Student Affairs Office serves as a liaison between students, faculty and administration. The primary function of Student Affairs Office is to be of assistance to students in any way possible. It leads, directs, and administers overall functions of student counseling, hostel residence, student societies and discipline. The important function of Student Affairs Office is to enhance the quality of student life both in and outside of the classroom.
Overseen by Dean Student Affairs, this office is a central place for students where they can express and get help about any problem, they encounter on campus whether it is academic, personal or emotional.
The Student Affairs Office has a full-time Assistant Director Student Affairs, who is readily available to students for sorting out problems. The students are encouraged to have recourse to him for counseling and guidance. Efforts are made to ensure a student life, free from worries and distractions, to help them learn to manage their affairs on their own and to cope with strains and stresses which are part of the growth processes.
The Student Affairs Office functions as a friend and guide of a student, it administers his needs from the time he steps in the Institute for admission, to the time he graduates from the Institute. It provides forums for cultivation of literary and artistic potentialities and furnishes them healthy outlets in sports and games, which make their stay on campus, a rich experience of multi-dimensional growth.
The student Affairs Office provides proactive support and capacity building services to promote co- curricular activities in the Institute which could enrich our graduates at every stage of their life as well as they could build strong relationships with their peers, faculty, administration and other stakeholders.
Career Development Office
Directorate of Student Affair and Counselling and External Relations at LGU, with the collaboration of Rozee.pk, has developed a Career Portal for students and alumni.
The portal provides listings of recent jobs related to disciplines offered at LGU. Students and alumni can sign up with their University Registration numbers to become a member and to apply for current vacancies.
At Lahore Garrison University (LGU), we are fully conscious of the utility of earning practical experience for students by undergoing internship(s) during their studies. Interning in a field of choice will stand out on students’ resume and help them with their job search after graduation. Students/interns should endeavor to gain on-the-job training that integrates education and career development, while organizations and companies hosting interns also benefitted from the contributions of creative and innovative students. People/Students meet during their internship become subsequently professional “contacts” who can help guide their career path as they make their way into professional world.
The office mainly serves the following purposes:
The office is used for advising the students
Information on various companies is available from the Careers Office
The office serves as a bridge between the perspective employers and students
The office helps the students in the preparation of their CV
The office helps in finding internships for the students
Student Counselling Service
The Office of Student Affairs promotes a sense of community and belongingness among students, and through our efforts we convey the message to students that they are not alone in times of stress. The student counselor works regularly with students to help them in their emotional, psychological, familial, and academic problems. Stress management techniques and relaxation methods are offered to deal with anxiety and stress. We assure the students the complete confidentiality of their discussions.

Programme Objectives:
To prepare the students for having thorough understanding of the principles, methods and concepts of modern chemistry.
To enable the students to efficiently design and carry out their research independently which could potentially lead to the new avenues of practically applicable knowledge, systematic investigations leading to scientific discoveries.
To improve the interpersonal communication skills of the students as well as their presentation skills within and across the disciplinary lines.
To prepare the students for different career opportunities in academia and industry with an advanced doctorate degree in chemistry.
Learning Outcomes
Consolidate the diversity of viewpoints, approaches and balance between basic and applied research in Chemistry, offering a rich intellectual atmosphere.
Achieve a molecular level understanding of the natural world and thus forms the basis for much of modern Chemistry.
Cultivate the students’ conscientious working attitude, and train students to face challenges and make innovations.
Inculcate the understanding of ethical conduct of research.
Develop the skill to perform a critical analysis of scientific research problems in the field of chemistry.
Promotion of professional development and growth of the faculty.
Admission/Eligibility Criteria
Eighteen years of education (MS/M.Phil. Chemistry) or Equivalent degree with minimum CGPA of 3.0/4.0 (Semester system) or 1
st
Division (60% marks: annual system), and in accordance with instructions issued from time to time by HEC and no third division (annual system) or ‘D’ grade (semester system) throughout the academic career.
GRE GAT (Subject) minimum 60% marks or departmental test conducted by the university admission committee at par with GRE in accordance to instructions issued by HEC.
Interview conducted by the university admission committee.

title: English Department HODs Message – Lahore Garrison University
text:
English Department HODs Message – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
English Department HODs Message
LGU
2026-06-15T09:14:48+00:00
HOD’s Message
Our mission is to take a leading role in the region to prepare our students to be critical readers and thinkers through developing their analytical abilities and appreciation of the literary and linguistic productions of their own culture and those of other cultures and communities. As a team, we make a vibrant academic community which is fully poised to expand its students’ linguistic and literary horizons. This is achieved through lectures, workshops, seminars and faculty-student interaction. Our instructors motivate the students to tailor their individual understanding of language and literature and facilitate them in responding to their academic and pre-professional needs. Similarly, we invite notable authors and scholars for their insightful lectures and readings.
We boast that our students, upon graduation, leave us having extensive theoretical knowledge about English language and literature. As for our research-based programmes, these are designed to equip our students with skills in independent inquiry, critical thinking, valuable interlocution, originality – all that is needed for conducting invaluable academic research. We also boast our state-of-the-art facilities which include a well-stocked university library, fully equipped computer labs, online research databases, as well as printing and scanning facilities. We are very keen to contribute in the actualization of the vision and mission of Lahore Garrison University (LGU) through various academic programmes and research activities. LGU English Department is committed to produce better individuals to build our nation.
I am looking forward to seeing you at the Department of English Language and Literature and wish all our students and graduates continued growth and success in their educational and professional endeavors.
Mr. Qasim Ali
HOD English Department

title: ERP – Lahore Garrison University
text:
ERP – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
ERP
LGU
2021-12-24T16:18:23+00:00
Introduction
The Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) office supports all the departments from a single platform. ERP is a system that automates all activities, from admission to degree issue. Automation and computerization have made it simpler for institutions to manage students’ enrollments, admissions, fees collecting, examinations, and so on. It provides a centralized medium for all students and faculty of LGUs that use ERP to access/report information. It acts as a centralized platform for all stakeholders, offering:
1. Student Portal
2. Faculty Portal
3. Office Automation Portal
4. Admission Portal
5. Dashboards

2024-11-15T16:17:32+00:00
Introduction
ERP is a system that automates all the processes from admission to issuance of degrees and provides a central medium of accessing/ reporting information to all the students and faculty of LGU provisioned by ERP LGU. It serves as a centralized platform for all the stakeholders by means of:
1. Student Portal
2. Faculty Portal
3. Office Automation Portal
4. Admission Portal
5. Dashboards
6. Website

Faculty of Computer Sciences
Deptt. of Computer Science, Information Technology & Software Engineering

BS Urdu
NOTE SECTION:
1. The following dues are also applicable as per the Program / Scheme of studies.
Practical Fee Per Semester ——————- 2,500
CS Lab Fee Per Semester ——————— 1,000
2. Shaheeds means those who embraced shahadat in any war, laydown their lives in any action for the defence of the country, duly declared by W and E Dte GHQ. Only Rs 5,000 shall be charged as security (Refundable), 3-SF Category (Free).
3. Tuition Fee, Exam Fee, Society Fund, Magazine Charges, Misc. Charges and Enrollment Fee shall be charged on a semester and annual basis, respectively.
4. All Fees is non non-refundable and can be changed without Prior notice.
5. Defence-based scholarship will be awarded to 100 students on merit basis.

title: H&A HOD’s Message – Lahore Garrison University
text:
H&A HOD’s Message – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
H&A HOD’s Message
LGU
2026-03-18T06:37:18+00:00
HOD’s Message
It is my privilege to welcome you to the Department of Humanities and Arts at Lahore Garrison University—an academic platform dedicated to fostering intellectual growth through interdisciplinary engagement and humanistic inquiry.
The department was established with a clear vision: to integrate diverse disciplines and create a dynamic academic environment that responds to the evolving needs of contemporary education. By bringing together the fields of International Relations & Political Science, Islamic Studies, and Urdu, we have cultivated a space that values both tradition and innovation.
At present, the department continues to uphold its academic commitments through ongoing programs, including PhD and MPhil degrees in Islamic Studies and Urdu, as well as undergraduate semesters in International Relations. These programs reflect our longstanding dedication to academic excellence and scholarly development.
As we move forward, the department is undergoing a strategic academic transition. While current cohorts are being supported to successful completion of their degrees, future admissions in these standalone programs have been concluded. This step marks an intentional shift toward strengthening our role as a fully interdisciplinary department within the university.
In this capacity, we proudly serve as a central academic resource, offering a wide array of allied and interdisciplinary courses across multiple faculties. Our curriculum spans areas such as Quranic Studies, Pakistan Studies, International Relations and Current Affairs, World History, Philosophy, Global Governance, Public Policy, Blue Economy, Emerging and Disruptive Technologies, and Comparative Foreign Policies of Great Powers. Through these offerings, we aim to equip students with critical thinking skills, ethical awareness, and a comprehensive understanding of both local and global challenges.
Our focus is not only on imparting knowledge but also on nurturing well-rounded individuals who can contribute meaningfully to society. The Department of Humanities and Arts remains committed to academic innovation, collaboration, and excellence as it evolves into a cornerstone of interdisciplinary education at Lahore Garrison University.
I invite you to explore our programs and initiatives and be a part of this transformative academic journey.
Dr. Kanwal Hayat
Chairperson
Department of Humanities and Arts

title: HOD Message Chemistry – Lahore Garrison University
text:
HOD Message Chemistry – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
HOD Message Chemistry
LGU
2025-07-07T22:37:06+00:00
HOD’s Message
Welcome to the Department of Chemistry at Lahore Garrison University!
The Department of Chemistry, at Lahore Garrison University is known for its center for cutting-edge research and academic excellence, where our experienced faculty mentor students through rigorous instruction and groundbreaking research. From traditional subfields such as biochemistry, organic, inorganic, and physical chemistry to interdisciplinary and theoretical research, we provide a strong framework that prepares students for leadership in science and industry.
At LGU, we are proud to announce the launch of a new undergraduate degree program, BS Computational Chemistry with Artificial Intelligence. This program is designed to meet the demands of the modern era, where AI and computational tools are revolutionizing industries, including pharmaceuticals, materials science, environmental sciences, and energy. Computational chemistry, combined with AI, enables scientists to predict molecular behavior, accelerate drug discovery, optimize industrial processes, and develop sustainable solutions for global challenges.
Graduates of this program will be equipped with cutting-edge skills in molecular modeling, machine learning, and advanced computational techniques, making them highly sought after in industries such as drug design, chemical manufacturing, AI-driven research, and beyond. The program also opens pathways to dynamic careers in academia and research institutions worldwide.
Chairperson
Department of Chemistry
Dr. Sadaf Sarfraz

title: HOD Message of Mathematics Department – Lahore Garrison University
text:
HOD Message of Mathematics Department – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
HOD Message of Mathematics Department
LGU
2026-02-14T07:15:49+00:00
DEPARTMENT OF MATHEMATICS
HOD Message
The significance of Mathematics is due to its increasing demand in stages with new advancements in engineering and science. The challenges of keeping up to date are absolutely essential. We are living in an era where the digital system has become an integral part of our daily lives. Apart from imagination and speculation, one cannot understand concepts in Engineering Science, Physics, Computer Science, Management Science, and Social Science without Mathematics.
Lahore Garrison University’s Mathematics department is dedicated to providing quality instructional services to all other departments. The department offers a BS Mathematics, BS Industrial Mathematics, M.Phil Mathematics and PhD Mathematics programs. Our professors are dedicated to providing high-quality instruction in conceptual areas. Aside from the many Mathematics degrees, the department also provides a solid scientific and mathematical foundation to undergraduate professionals in all of the university’s other departments.
Beyond degrees, the department plays a pivotal role in providing a robust scientific and mathematical foundation to undergraduate professionals across all university departments. Actively engaged in pure, applied, and computational mathematics, our faculty significantly contributes to advancing the frontiers of mathematical knowledge, fostering international collaboration.
Throughout the academic calendar, we host seminars, conferences, and workshops, fostering intellectual discourse. Guided by a commitment to excellence, I invite you to explore the limitless possibilities Mathematics offers, unraveling the mysteries of the universe and driving innovation.
Best Wishes
Dr. Muhammad Nadeem
Assistant Professor
HOD | Department of Mathematics

title: HOD’s Message – Lahore Garrison University
text:
HOD’s Message – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
HOD’s Message
LGU
2026-06-16T06:05:40+00:00
Chairperson Message
Greetings!
I am delighted to welcome you to the Department of Management Sciences. Our department is a dynamic and inclusive community of dedicated faculty, staff, and students committed to academic excellence and innovation. We strive to equip you with the knowledge and skills necessary to excel as future leaders in today’s evolving business environment through intellectually rigorous and professionally relevant learning experiences.
At DMS we inspire transformation, so our values spell together as INSPIRE. We ignite
I
nnovation to solve real-world challenges, guided by Empathy that
N
urtures inclusivity, driven by a sense of
S
ocial Responsibility to uplift communities, committed to
P
rofessional Excellence in all we do, anchored in
I
ntegrity that builds trust, and strengthened by
R
espect and Gratitude for every voice that shapes our collective journey towards
E
ntrepreneurial mindset.
Currently, our department is home to 36 teaching faculty members and around 700 talented undergraduate and graduate students enrolled in programs such as Bachelor of Business Administration – BBA , Bachelor of Accounting & Finance (BSAF), Bachelor’s in Digital Business (BDB), BS Economics with Data Analytics (BSEDA), Master of Business Administration (MBA) for business and non-business graduates, Master of Science in Business Administration (MSBA), Associate Degrees in Business Administration and Accounting & Finance and Doctor of Philosophy (PhD) in Management Sciences .
Recently, the National Business Education Accreditation Council (NBEAC) of the Higher Education Commission (HEC) of Pakistan awarded our department an ‘X’ category.
I encourage each of you to fully engage in your classes and take advantage of the educational opportunities available. We are here to support you at every step of the way.
I invite you to explore our department’s website for more information. Whether as a visitor or a valued member of our student, staff, or faculty community, we look forward to welcoming you to LGU in the future.
BEST,
Dr. Hafiz Muhammad Zia Ul Haq
Chairperson Department of Management Sciences
Department of Management Sciences

title: HR Home – Lahore Garrison University
text:
HR Home – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
HR Home
LGU
2025-03-20T15:35:04+00:00
Overview
Human capital is the backbone of any organization, and at Lahore Garrison University, we recognize its critical role in driving institutional excellence. The LGU Human Resources Department is entrusted with the responsibility of designing, implementing, and managing comprehensive HR strategies that align seamlessly with the University’s Vision and Mission.
Our HR department oversees a wide range of core functions to support the University’s objectives, including:
• Recruitment and Talent Acquisition
• Compensation and Benefits Structuring
• Employee Development and Training
• Performance Management:
• Grievance Handling and Conflict Resolution
Each of these functions is executed with the highest level of professionalism, integrity, and compliance with LGU’s guiding principles. Our goal is to cultivate a workplace that not only supports individual growth but also contributes to the collective success of the University.
At LGU, the Human Resources Department is committed to fostering an environment where every team member feels valued, supported, and empowered to excel. We continue to innovate and refine our practices to uphold the highest standards of HR excellence in service of our university’s mission.

title: IBTIDA-Business Incubation Centre – Lahore Garrison University
text:
IBTIDA-Business Incubation Centre – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
IBTIDA-Business Incubation Centre
LGU
2025-12-15T11:38:27+00:00
IBTIDA
– Business Incubation Centre
Welcome to IBTIDA
IBTIDA
, the Business Incubation Centre of Lahore Garrison University, is where innovation meets entrepreneurship. We are committed to nurturing creative minds and transforming groundbreaking ideas into thriving business ventures. Our mission is to empower students and aspiring entrepreneurs by providing them with the resources, opportunities, and mentorship they need to develop successful business ventures. Through a collaborative and dynamic environment, IBTIDA fosters innovation across various industries, encouraging students to think outside the box and develop sustainable, scalable solutions. Our comprehensive incubation program offers access to extensive resources, expert guidance from industry leaders, networking opportunities, and hands-on training in critical business areas such as product development, marketing, and financial planning. Whether you’re at the idea stage, developing your startup, or ready to scale, IBTIDA is here to support you at every step of your entrepreneurial journey.
We invite all students of Lahore Garrison University to register their business ideas and startups, take advantage of our incubation services, and become part of a growing community of innovators. Together, we are shaping the future of entrepreneurship and creating a lasting impact on society through innovation.
Why Us
At
IBTIDA Business Incubation Centre
of Lahore Garrison University, we empower aspiring entrepreneurs with cutting-edge resources, expert mentorship from industry leaders, and a vibrant ecosystem tailored for innovation and growth. Our strategic location in Lahore, state-of-the-art facilities, and proven track record of launching successful startups set us apart. We offer unparalleled networking opportunities, access to funding avenues, and hands-on training designed to transform your ideas into thriving businesses. Choose IBTIDA as your launchpad and accelerate your journey toward entrepreneurial success.
Collaboration & Partnerships
International
National
Industrial
At Ibtida Business Incubation Centre, collaboration is a core pillar of our ecosystem. We actively build meaningful partnerships to expand opportunities, enhance innovation, and provide startups with exposure to national and global markets.
International Collaborations
enable cross-border learning, global mentorship, and international market access through partnerships with global incubation centers and innovation hubs.
National Partnerships
strengthen Pakistan’s startup ecosystem through linkages with accelerators, universities, government bodies, and entrepreneurial networks.
Industrial Collaborations
connect startups with industry leaders and corporations, supporting mentorship, pilot projects, commercialization, and real-world problem-solving.

title: IBTIDA- Call for Applications – Lahore Garrison University
text:
IBTIDA- Call for Applications – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
IBTIDA- Call for Applications
LGU
2025-12-15T11:29:24+00:00
IBTIDA
– Business Incubation Centre
Cohort 8 – Ibtida Business Incubation Centre, LGU
Join
Cohort 8
at the Ibtida Business Incubation Centre and embark on a transformative journey to turn your innovative ideas into impactful startups. As part of Lahore Garrison University’s commitment to strengthening Pakistan’s entrepreneurial ecosystem, this cohort offers a structured
6-month incubation program
tailored for early-stage ventures ready to grow, validate, and scale.
What You’ll Gain:
Free Co-Working Space:
Access dedicated and flexible workspaces with modern amenities—designed to foster collaboration and productivity at no cost.
High-Speed Internet Access:
Reliable and uninterrupted connectivity to support research, development, and seamless online operations.
Networking Opportunities:
Engage with industry mentors, fellow entrepreneurs, investors, and alumni through exclusive events, workshops, and strategic partnerships, including our MoU with
ASPIRE Pakistan
.
Comprehensive Training Programs:
Hands-on workshops covering business planning, ideation, prototyping, marketing, and scaling—led by certified entrepreneurial coaches and master trainers.
Seed Funding Support:
Eligibility for initial funding of up to
PKR 1,000,000
, along with structured guidance on pitching to angel investors and venture capitalists.
Expert Mentorship:
One-on-one mentorship from experienced professionals to refine your business model, overcome challenges, and accelerate growth.
Idea Shaping & Problem-Solving Sessions:
Customized sessions to validate concepts, address local market needs, and develop sustainable, real-world solutions.
Team Formation & Strengthening Support:
Assistance in building or enhancing your founding team through recruitment support, mentorship matching, and team-building activities.
Learning & Development Resources:
A curated curriculum featuring innovation frameworks, financial literacy, legal essentials, and startup best practices.
Impact Creation Tools:
A strong focus on measurable social and economic impact, including sustainability training and tools to track outcomes.

title: IBTIDA-Vision and Mission – Lahore Garrison University
text:
IBTIDA-Vision and Mission – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
IBTIDA-Vision and Mission
LGU
2025-12-15T11:24:13+00:00
IBTIDA
– Business Incubation Centre
Vision
To become Pakistan’s leading catalyst for innovation and entrepreneurship, the Ibtida Business Incubation Centre at Lahore Garrison University aspires to nurture high-impact startup ventures that drive sustainable economic growth. By strategically bridging academia, industry, and investment, we aim to strengthen the national innovation ecosystem, develop globally competitive enterprises, create meaningful employment opportunities, and position Pakistan as a hub of entrepreneurial excellence.
Mission
Ibtida is committed to fostering a vibrant and inclusive entrepreneurial culture within Lahore Garrison University and beyond. We empower aspiring innovators and early-stage startups through comprehensive support, world-class mentorship, cutting-edge infrastructure, and strong industry linkages. From ideation to market entry and scale, our mission is to transform bold ideas into sustainable, scalable businesses that generate lasting social and economic value.

title: IT CCTV Surveillance – Lahore Garrison University
text:
IT CCTV Surveillance – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
IT CCTV Surveillance
LGU
2021-12-27T07:40:05+00:00
CCTV Surveillance
CCTV surveillance is a confidential system providing security over the Campus. More than 240 IT based networking cameras are recording live streaming in order to save thousands of lives and to monitor the conduct of students and LGU officials.
a)   CCTV System monitoring and playback
It is complex but necessary for IT team to monitor all the cameras at the same time. In recent year, a CCTV control room with professional equipment for live streaming videos has
been  developed. The Vice Chancellor has been watching live views of all cameras from anywhere on his mobile phone.
b)  CCTV equipment Specification
i.   64-channel Hikvision NVR (3 in total) with 4 months playback.
ii.  32-channel Hikvision (2 in total) NVR with 2 months playback.
iii. 24-port POE (20 in total) Cisco Switches.
iv. 240 Hikvision Dome and Bullet cameras.
c)  CCTV System at Parking & Sports Complex
The CCTV Systems project at the Parking & Sports Complex is completed in the time frame of two months. In all, 50 cameras have been deployed to provide state-of-the-art
surveillance video playback with 24/7 live coverage.

title: IT Data Center – Lahore Garrison University
text:
IT Data Center – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
IT Data Center
LGU
2021-12-27T09:04:45+00:00
Data Center
Data center is a core networking area that facilitates internet bandwidth all over the campus while also providing different server services.
a)   Data Center Services
i. Firewall
ii. Network Bandwidth Services
iii. ERP Services
iv. Moodle Services
v. Backup Services
vi. Centralizing printing services
vii. Qmatic System Services
viii. Biometric attendance Services
ix. Free Wi-fi Facility for students
b)
Data Center Completion Projects
IT team has completed the fiber-based network project at LGU. There are up to 170 TP Link Access Points for providing internet bandwidth to LGU officers and Faculty as well as facilitates Auditoriums, Conference Rooms, Meeting Halls, Classes, Media House, Sports Complex. The whole campus networking is controlled directly by Data Center. A total of 170 Access Points has been deployed to Provide state of the art network connection to whole university.
c)   Hardware Lab
Recent year, IT team inaugurated the hardware lab to provide the first aid repairs to LGU officers’ laptops and computers.
d)  Networking equipment specification
i. 170 TP-Link Access Points (300,1200,1750)
ii. Hardware Based Firewall
iii. Dell networking server with Radius Manager DMA
iv. Dell Backup server with Radius Manager DMA
v. Hp Server for ERP Services.
vi. More than 70-Switches Cisco and TP-Link
vii. HP and Dell brands Laptop, Computers, Printers, and other equipment’s.
e)   State of the art LAB Services
i. Ethernet Connections with I/O Ports
ii. Wireless Connectivity
iii. Multimedia Projectors installed
iv. Upgraded systems specs through RAM and Processor Revive.
v. Software System Services Improved.

title: IT HOD’s Message – Lahore Garrison University
text:
IT HOD’s Message – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
IT HOD’s Message
LGU
2026-03-14T12:21:46+00:00
HOD’s Message
Welcome to the Department of Information Technology, a place where innovation meets excellence and future leaders are shaped with purpose.
Our department proudly offers a diverse range of cutting-edge programs, including MSIT, BSIT, BS Artificial Intelligence, and BS Cyber Security. Each program is thoughtfully designed to equip students with the knowledge, practical skills, and mindset needed to thrive in today’s rapidly evolving digital world. We take great pride in our state-of-the-art computer labs, advanced learning resources, and a team of highly experienced, dedicated faculty members who are committed to guiding students toward academic excellence and professional success. Our programs are fully accredited by NCEAC, ensuring the highest standards of quality, relevance, and credibility.
At the core of our vision is a commitment to developing skilled professionals and responsible citizens—individuals who not only excel in the tech industry but also contribute positively to society. We believe in fostering curiosity, creativity, and critical thinking, enabling our students to become innovators, problem-solvers, and ethical leaders of tomorrow.
Whether you are beginning your academic journey or advancing in your professional path, the Department of IT is the right place to turn your aspirations into achievements. We welcome you to join us and become part of a vibrant, forward-looking community that is shaping the future of technology.
Together, let’s build the future—one innovation at a time.
Dr. Umer Iqbal
HOD
IT/Associate Professor
Lahore Garrison University

Visit KDU Global Website
Registrations Open
International Opportunities
Exchange
LGU–KDU Spring 2026 Undergraduate Exchange Program (South Korea)
Mar 2026 – Jul 2026
Lahore Garrison University is delighted to invite applications for the Spring 2026 Undergraduate Semester Exchange Program at Kyungdong University Global (KDU Global), South Korea.
Experience world-class education at one of South Korea’s leading international universities! Located in the scenic coastal city of Goseong, KDU Global offers an innovative academic environment with diverse cultural exposure and modern learning facilities. Students can explore Korea’s rich traditions, cutting-edge technology, and vibrant lifestyle, making this program a truly global learning opportunity.
Eligible undergraduate students currently enrolled between the 2nd and 5th semesters in the listed departments are encouraged to apply. Applicants must maintain a minimum CGPA of
2.71
, have an
IELTS score of 5.5
or
TEPS equivalent
, and be willing to return to LGU upon completion of the exchange semester.
Selected students will receive a
100% tuition scholarship
(USD 5,000) for the Spring 2026 semester, while covering travel, visa, dormitory, and admission costs (approx. USD 2,500).
Dr Khushbu Khalid Butt (Mar - June 2026)
Dr. Asia Bibi (Mar - June 2026)

title: About Us – Lahore Garrison University
text:
About Us – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
About Us
LGU
2026-05-06T16:51:18+00:00
OUR VISION
An inclusive university nurturing skilled professionals and responsible citizens.
OUR MISSION
To foster an open and supportive educational environment that produces graduates who can innovate as entrepreneurs and serve as responsible citizens through transformative learning, industry collaboration and a commitment to sustainability.
CORE VALUES
Innovation
Excellence
Empathy
Discipline
Integrity
Inclusivity
Attitude of Gratitude
Team Building
6040
Students
1075
Courses
366
Faculty
1
Campus
Message by the Vice Chancellor
The long-term growth and sustainable development of nations highly depend on the professional excellence of its individuals. Human resources can perform excellently only if their capabilities are developed, continuously upgraded, and they are sufficiently motivated to work both individually and collectively for the welfare of society. This can only occur in the presence of an inclusive, vibrant, dynamic, and competitive higher education system that meets both national and international standards of excellence and practice. Universities’ contributions go beyond traditional academic roles, profoundly impacting economic, social, and environmental dimensions.
Lahore Garrison University (LGU) envisions a research-driven and demand-oriented future by providing quality education to ensure a sustained supply of talented graduates with strong leadership and entrepreneurial skills. Our university takes pride in fostering strong character development grounded in ethical and moral values. The diversity and depth of our academic programs, along with the multidisciplinary nature of our applied research, inspire creative, imaginative, and innovative insights that offer solutions to real-world problems. We are committed to making a meaningful impact by heavily investing in academic, research, and innovation programs that benefit society, drive economies, promote sustainable growth, and contribute to comprehensive societal development.
The faculty at LGU is highly qualified, experienced, and dedicated, consistently striving to create a student-centered learning environment through creative pedagogy. The institute features exceptional infrastructure facilities conducive to higher teaching-learning environments and research. We are committed to building strong collaborations with industry and academic institutions, both nationally and internationally, to enhance our research and innovation capacities. These efforts not only enrich the learning experience for our faculty and students but also provide opportunities for active participation in real-world projects, offering invaluable hands-on experience.
I warmly invite you to join us on this thrilling voyage of education, exploration, and creativity.
Maj Gen Muhammad Khalil Dar, HI(M) (Retd)

Objectives and Program Outcomes of M. Phil Biotechnology
Objectives:
The main objectives of M. Phil Biotechnology degree program are:
To equip the students with a comprehensive understanding of contemporary knowledge and methodologies in the field of Biotechnology, also empowering them to conduct applied research and generate scholarly publications.
To develop knowledgeable scholars in biotechnology, well-versed in the latest trends and advancements in scientific research within the field of biological sciences.
To cultivate expertise in the areas of Microbial Biotechnology, Health Biotechnology, Environmental Biotechnology, Food and Agricultural Biotechnology, and related allied disciplines, fostering the creation of novel knowledge and advancements in the realm of Biotechnology.
Outcomes:
After completing the MPhil Biotechnology degree, students will be able to:
Recognize the cutting-edge literature in the field of Biotechnology while understanding the theoretical and practical underpinnings of his/her work and indicate how the research may be able to contribute to it.
Discover job opportunities in the biotechnology industry in the sectors of academics, research and diagnostic labs, dairy, food, agricultural, poultry, livestock, waste management, and environmental protection agencies, both locally and abroad.
Demonstrate their research findings through seminar presentations, sharing their work with fellow students and faculty members during scholarly gatherings in the field of Biotechnology.
Gain practical expertise in utilizing statistical, computing, and other relevant techniques for effectively collecting and analyzing research data in the field of Biotechnology.

title: Mass Communication Chairperson’s Message – Lahore Garrison University
text:
Mass Communication Chairperson’s Message – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Mass Communication Chairperson’s Message
LGU
2025-10-10T13:15:03+00:00
Chairperson’s Message
Welcome to the Department of Mass Communication at Lahore Garrison University, where we are committed to shaping the future of media and communication in a rapidly evolving digital world.
Our vision is to lead in creating media professionals equipped with the skills and knowledge to thrive in today’s dynamic, tech-driven communication landscape. We believe in fostering innovation, creativity, and critical thinking in our students, preparing them to become trailblazers in their respective fields.
Through our mission, we strive to offer cutting-edge education and hands-on training that bridges the gap between theory and practice. Our programs focus on developing expertise in media production, digital storytelling, strategic communication, and technological innovation, empowering graduates to excel in diverse areas of the media and communication industry.
Our state-of-the-art broadcasting house, equipped with advanced radio and TV production facilities, reflects our commitment to providing students with real-world experiences that align with industry demands. As a department, we are dedicated to nurturing talent and inspiring future leaders who will not only adapt to the ever-changing media landscape but also redefine it.
Join us in this exciting journey of exploration, creativity, and excellence. Together, let’s make an impact in the world of media and communication.
Warm regards,
Dr. Farrah Ul Momineen
Chairperson, Department of Mass Communication
Lahore Garrison University

title: Masters of Philosophy in Chemistry – Lahore Garrison University
text:
Masters of Philosophy in Chemistry – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Masters of Philosophy in Chemistry
LGU
2024-07-22T18:58:16+00:00
Masters of Philosophy in Chemistry
Program Vision
Produce creative and innovative postgraduates in the field of Chemistry who become instrumental in upholding its international standards.
Program Mission
To contribute in technical and socio-economic development through research based quality education, targeting excellence in basic and applied research while fully engaging them on professional skills.
Program Objectives
To impart postgraduate students with a conceptual understanding of the basic and Advanced level Chemistry.
To develop the capability of analyzing, addressing and posing solutions to problems related to applied research.
To enhance student competence in the design and conduct of experiments and analysis and presentation of experimental data and results.
To equip students with the necessary skills set for pursuing careers in Chemistry education, research and industry.
Program Learning Outcomes
After the completion of M.Phil. Chemistry degree, students will be able to:
Appreciate the theoretical and experimental skills making them capable of designing, predicting, modeling and analyzing the behavior of Chemical processes.
Spirit of working individually as well as in interactive groups with the necessary requirements of scientific and professional ethics.
Grasp hands on experience and scientific communication skills to clearly present their research work.
Play role at national level in the increase of higher education standards and can positively fulfill the needs in the industry
Basic Eligibility Requirements for Admission:
Admission is purely merit-based and rests solely on the following criteria:
Submission of Complete Application
Academic Record
Performance in admission test
Application Review Interview Performance (if shortlisted)
Application processing fee
Supporting documents by the stipulated deadline
Admission/eligibility criteria
Admission to M.Phil. Chemistry Program required
1:Basic Academic Qualification
: BS Chemistry (Sixteen years of schooling or 4-year education with minimum 120 credit hours) after F.Sc/Grade 12 shall be required for admission in the M.Phil. Chemistry Program.
2: Admission Test
:
a)
A rigorous University admission test as an eligibility condition for admission to M.Phil. Chemistry program with a passing score of 50%.
OR
b)
Accept the GRE/HAT General/Equivalent tests, with a passing score of 50%.
Course Duration: 2 Years
Total Credit Hours: 30
Semester: 4

2023-10-05T07:11:12+00:00
Masters of Philosophy in Mathematics
The Masters of Philosophy in Mathematics program at Lahore Garrison University prepares to provide scholars with a strong foundation in Mathematics, incorporating up-to-date professional skills, aimed at enhancing and producing top-tier research adhering to global benchmarks. This empowers students to apply diverse mathematical methods and strategies for addressing challenges across mathematical and allied domains, fostering understanding through published works, interactive sessions, and academic teaching. Cultivate ethical, humane, and professional principles among graduates, molding them into competent, cultured, and accountable contributors to society.

MPhil English Literature – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
MPhil English Literature
LGU
2024-11-01T07:58:36+00:00
MPhil English Literature
MPhil English Literature
Course Duration: 2 Years
Total Credit Hours: 30
Semester: 4
Apply Now
Fee Structure
Programme Objectives
The MPhil English program intends to:
Enhance literary competence among students by a comparative analysis of different writers/ critiques, genres and themes in English Literature.
Analyze the complex interactions and interdependencies of global, regional and local aspects of life in the social, economic, political and religious spheres.
Empower students’ critical thinking in the interpretation of texts through research-oriented learning.
Programme Learning Outcomes
The successful students of MPhil English Literature will be able to:
Construe the complex interactions and interdependencies of global, regional and local aspects of life in the social, economic, political and religious spheres.
Analyze various literary texts and theories of global and multicultural literatures through comparative analysis.
Design research projects/thesis by employing their critical analytical skills in order to meet modern world needs.
Course Duration
Minimum duration of MPhil English Literature program (24+6=30) is 02 years and maximum three years. Course work of 24 credit hours is required to be completed in the first year ( two semesters) followed by a comprehensive examination and thesis of 6 credit hours in the next year( two semesters).
Admission Requirements
A candidate seeking admission in MPhil English Literature program should have completed sixteen years of education or 4 years of education after FA/FSc/A level or equivalent in English.
A candidate must have 50% marks (under annual system; MA English) or 2.5 out of 4.00 CGPA (under semester system) in BS English program.
A university GAT test will be conducted by department admission committee. Qualifying score for this test will be 50%. There is no age limit for admission to MPhil program.
Note: Merit list of minimum 10 students of MPhil programme will be displayed.
Degree Requirements
Enrolled Students must complete 24 credit hours in 2 semesters and secure minimum 2.5 CPGA to qualify for research thesis in 3
rd
semester and 4
th
semester that are comprised 6 credit hours.
For degree, student must earn minimum CGPA of 2.50 and have successfully completed research thesis.

title: MS Data Science Overview – Lahore Garrison University
text:
MS Data Science Overview – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
MS Data Science Overview
LGU
2025-01-13T18:50:12+00:00
Programme overview and scope:
MS degree programme in Data science will provide students the comprehensive skills and knowledge they need to pursue the best career option in one of the most dynamic areas of modern technology. The program will prepare students with broad scientific knowledge, an aptitude in a variety of mathematical and statistical techniques and the ability to synthesize. The main aim of the program is to provide students with the options to be part of a data science endeavour that begins with the identification of business processes, determination of data provenance and ownership, understanding the ecosystem of the business decisions, skill sets and tools that shape the data, making data amenable to analytics, identifying sub-problems, recognizing the technology matrix required for problem resolution, creating incrementally-complex data-driven models and then maintaining them to ultimately leverage them for business growth.
Programme Objectives:
The main objectives of the MSDS degree programme are:
⦁ To equip students with an in-depth understanding of core and advanced concepts in data science, including data engineering, machine learning, statistical modeling, and big data technologies.
⦁ To develop students’ ability to think critically and analytically, enabling them to design and implement data-driven solutions that address complex organizational and societal challenges.
⦁ To train students in the application of advanced computational, statistical, and machine learning methodologies to extract meaningful insights from diverse and large-scale datasets.
⦁ To produce professionals capable of meeting the growing demand for data science expertise in national and international markets, across industries such as finance, healthcare, and technology.
⦁ To encourage students to engage in innovative research and prepare for advanced studies, enabling contributions to cutting-edge developments in data science and related fields.
Learning Outcomes:
After the completion of degree students will be able:
⦁
Comprehensive Knowledge:
To demonstrate a deep understanding of specialized areas in data science, including machine learning, big data analytics, and statistical modeling, fostering a broad perspective on the field’s potential applications and impact.
⦁
Critical Thinking and Problem Solving:
To exhibit strong analytical and problem-solving skills to address complex, data-driven challenges, applying innovative and evidence-based approaches to real-world scenarios.
⦁
Practical Application:
To apply advanced data science tools, techniques, and methodologies to develop solutions that address critical societal and industrial needs, delivering strategic value.
⦁
Research Excellence:
To conduct impactful research in challenging areas of data science, contributing novel insights, methodologies, and advancements to the field’s body of knowledge.
⦁
Academic Readiness:
To demonstrate readiness for advanced studies, including doctoral programs, in data science and allied disciplines, at globally renowned institutions.

title: MSAI Award of Degree and Completion Time – Lahore Garrison University
text:
MSAI Award of Degree and Completion Time – Lahore Garrison University

MSAI Award of Degree and Completion Time
LGU
2025-01-13T19:41:17+00:00
Award of MSAI Degree:
For the award of MSAI degree, candidates shall:
Either need to complete 30 credit hours of course work OR
Complete 24 credit hours of coursework along with a minimum of six (6) credit hours for research work/thesis.
Obtained a CGPA of 2.5 or more.
Degree Completion Timeline:
⦁ The MSAI degree shall be awarded by the universities not before the completion of 2.0 years or four (04) regular semesters and not after completion of four (04) years or eight (08) regular semesters, save exceptions mentioned below.
⦁ In case a student is unable to secure an MS within 2 years than ask for extension in duration, the university may constitute appropriate authority and determine the causes of delay. In the event of force majeure (i.e., delay on account of circumstance beyond the control of student), the university may grant an extension in the period of award of MS degree in accordance with the duration limiting factor(s) and shall also take corrective measures in case the delay is caused by process or administrative reasons.

title: MSAI Overview – Lahore Garrison University
text:
MSAI Overview – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
MSAI Overview
LGU
2025-01-13T19:40:41+00:00
Programme overview and scope:
The research and development in interdisciplinary domains of artificial intelligence applications can solve many daily routine problems and improve our lifestyle by offering products in many domains such as smart homes, smart cities, smart agriculture, smart vehicles, business intelligence, smart surveillance, and smart healthcare. To meet these objectives, it is required to equip our upcoming students with the latest technologies and essential skills in AI covering both theory and practical aspects. The MS AI programme should enable the students to learn essential theoretical knowledge and learn marketable skills in AI. This programme offers advanced courses to understand core concepts of machine learning as well as specialized elective courses to train students with state-of-the-art skills in AI. This programme will not only produce AI-trained scientists and engineers who can meet the requirements of AI and data science in the Pakistani industry/globally but also it will help the students who like to start a research-based career and planning to enroll in a PhD programme.
Programme Objectives:
The main objectives of the MSAI degree programme are:
⦁ To broaden the academic and professional perspectives of students through a rigorous curriculum focused on core and emerging areas of artificial intelligence.
⦁ To cultivate students’ abilities to think critically and solve complex problems, enabling them to design and implement intelligent business decisions and innovative AI-driven solutions for real-world challenges.
⦁ To equip students with advanced computational, statistical, and machine learning techniques for processing and analyzing large, complex datasets, preparing them for data-centric roles in AI.
⦁ To develop professionals who can effectively meet the evolving demands of both national and international markets for artificial intelligence products, solutions, and expertise.
⦁ To foster a research-oriented mindset, empowering students to contribute to groundbreaking advancements in artificial intelligence and enabling them to pursue doctoral studies and advanced research in AI and allied technologies.
Learning Outcomes:
After the completion of degree students will be able:
⦁
Comprehensive Knowledge:
To demonstrate a deep understanding of specialized areas in Artificial Intelligence, fostering an expanded vision of the field’s potential applications and implications.
⦁
Critical Thinking and Problem Solving:
To exhibit strong analytical and problem-solving skills to address complex and non-trivial challenges in AI, applying innovative approaches.
⦁
Practical Application:
To apply advanced AI tools and techniques to develop solutions with strategic value, addressing key societal and industrial needs.
⦁
Research Excellence:
To conduct impactful research in challenging areas of AI, contributing novel insights and advancements to the field.
⦁
Academic Readiness:
To demonstrate preparedness for advanced studies, including doctoral programs, in Artificial Intelligence and related domains at globally renowned institutions.
.

title: Admission Eligibility and Selection Criteria – Lahore Garrison University
text:
Admission Eligibility and Selection Criteria – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Admission Eligibility and Selection Criteria
LGU
2025-01-13T05:32:38+00:00
Admission Eligibility and Selection Criteria:
i. Basic Academic Qualification:
Sixteen years of education or a 4-year degree programme (minimum of 120 credit hours) after HSSC/F.A./F.Sc./Grade 12 or an Equivalent qualification in a relevant subject, with at least 50% marks or a minimum CGPA of 2.5 on a 4.0 scale, is required for admission to the MSCS programme.
ii. Admission Test and Interview:
The GRE/GAT/HAT-General or University Admission Test, with a minimum cumulative score of 50%, is required for admission to the MSCS Programme. The GAT test score is valid for a period of two years. Additionally, candidates must achieve at least 50% marks in the interview.
iii.
Interdisciplinary Qualification:
The university may recommend deficiency courses of level 6 courses, after considering the educational background and knowledge of the candidate. The following courses are recommended to be completed before entering the MS (CS) Programme:
• Analysis of Algorithms
• Assembly Lang. / Computer Architecture
• Computer Networks
• Computer Programming
• Data Structures
• Database Systems
• Operating Systems
• Software Engineering
• Theory of Automata
A student selected for admission having deficiency in the above stated courses may be required to study a maximum of FOUR courses, which must be passed in the first two semesters. Deficiency courses shall be determined by the Admission Committee, before admitting the student.

title: MSCS Overview – Lahore Garrison University
text:
MSCS Overview – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
MSCS Overview
LGU
2025-01-13T06:27:48+00:00
Programme overview and scope:
The Master of Science in Computer Science (MSCS) degree Programme is designed to integrate advanced coursework with independent research, equipping students for impactful careers in technology, academia, or doctoral pursuits. The curriculum features core courses that deepen expertise in foundational areas such as Computer Architecture, Operating Systems, Theory of Automata, Analysis of Algorithms, and Theory of Programming Languages, alongside a diverse selection of electives that enable students to align their studies with personal interests and industry trends. Emphasizing technological innovation, the Programme incorporates experiential learning through hands-on projects, state-of-the-art research, and collaboration on emerging technologies. Students culminate their studies with a thesis, offering a platform to specialize in a specific domain and contribute to groundbreaking advancements in fields such as artificial intelligence, computer vision, biomedical imaging, cybersecurity, cloud computing, image processing, and data science.
Programme Objectives:
The main objectives of the MSCS degree Programme are:
• To strengthen the understanding and competence of students in computer science fundamentals.
• To introduce specialized courses with theoretical and practical knowledge, belong to salient areas of computing to broaden the vision of students.
• To develop critical thinking and problem-solving skills among students to address non-trivial problems.
• To promote research capabilities and enable students to make an active contribution in challenging research areas.
• To prepare students for higher studies.
Learning Outcomes:
After the successful completion of MSCS degree the students will be able:
• To effectively communicate, comprehend and apply computing knowledge to develop efficient solutions for real life problems.
• To critically evaluate the existing solution-based systems in the computing industry for their improvement.
• To critically analyze existing computing studies and identify the research gaps.
• To perform research and come up with innovative solutions in their relevant fields.
• To work effectively in the team including multidisciplinary members to solve computing problems.
• To understand the professional/research ethics and responsibilities of a computer scientist.

title: MSDS Admission Eligibility and Selection Criteria – Lahore Garrison University
text:
MSDS Admission Eligibility and Selection Criteria – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
MSDS Admission Eligibility and Selection Criteria
LGU
2025-01-13T19:29:00+00:00
Admission Eligibility and Selection Criteria:
⦁
Basic Academic Qualification:
Sixteen years of education or a BS degree in CS/SE/IT/DS/AI/Cyber security/Engineering/Mathematics/Statistics or in relevant discipline (4-year programme with a minimum of 120 credit hours) after HSSC/F.A./F.Sc./Grade 12 or an equivalent qualification, with at least 50% marks or a minimum CGPA of 2.5 on a 4.0 scale, shall be required for admission to the MSDS programme.
⦁
Admission Test and Interview
: GRE/GAT/HAT-General or University Admission Test, with a minimum cumulative score of 50%, is required for admission to the MSDS programme. The GAT test score is valid for a period of two years. Additionally, candidates must achieve at least 50% marks in the interview.
⦁
Interdisciplinary Qualification:
The university may recommend 3-9 CH of following deficiency courses of level 6 courses, after considering the educational background and knowledge of the candidate:
Programming Fundamentals (Core Programming Course)
Data Structures & Algorithms OR Design & Analysis of Algorithms
Database Systems
Deficiency courses shall be determined by the admission Committee, before admitting the student.

title: MSDS Award of Degree and Completion Time – Lahore Garrison University
text:
MSDS Award of Degree and Completion Time – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
MSDS Award of Degree and Completion Time
LGU
2025-01-13T19:32:28+00:00
Award of MSDS Degree:
For the award of MSDS degree, candidates shall:
Either need to complete 30 credit hours of course work OR
Complete 24 credit hours of coursework along with a minimum of six (6) credit hours for research work/thesis.
Obtained a CGPA of 2.5 or more.
Degree Completion Timeline:
⦁ The MSDS degree shall be awarded by the universities not before the completion of 2.0 years or four (04) regular semesters and not after completion of four (04) years or eight (08) regular semesters, save exceptions mentioned below.
⦁ In case a student is unable to secure an MS within 2 years than ask for extension in duration, the university may constitute appropriate authority and determine the causes of delay. In the event of force majeure (i.e., delay on account of circumstance beyond the control of student), the university may grant an extension in the period of award of MS degree in accordance with the duration limiting factor(s) and shall also take corrective measures in case the delay is caused by process or administrative reasons.

title: ORIC – Lahore Garrison University
text:
ORIC – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
ORIC
LGU
2025-03-15T08:57:27+00:00
LAHORE GARRISON UNIVERSITY
Research and Development Policy
Overview
The Office of Research, Innovation & Commercialization (ORIC) was established at Lahore Garrison University (LGU) in 2016, by following directions of the Higher Education Commission (HEC). It oversees all research-related activities funded within the university’s academic and research units. ORIC plays a vital role in fostering innovation, entrepreneurial growth, and addressing societal needs by coordinating and facilitating ideas that lead to commercialization. ORIC actively promotes collaboration between universities, industries, and research organizations, both nationally and internationally. It serves as a bridge between LGU researchers and domestic or international sponsors and donors, managing agreements for externally funded projects. These include Memorandums of Understanding (MOUs), grants (unrestricted and travel), sponsorships for conferences, workshops, and seminars, consultancy assignments, and educational or service-based initiatives. Investment in research, facilitated by ORIC, promotes knowledge-based economies and drives impactful innovation. Faculty at LGU are encouraged to pursue competitive national and international research grants, which contribute to postgraduate studies, enhance laboratory and equipment facilities, and sponsor student-led initiatives. Additionally, the development of innovative research projects, technology exhibitions, and business start-ups, creating opportunities for socio-economic development and academic excellence.
Establishment of ORIC at LGU
The establishment of the Office of Research, Innovation, and Commercialization (ORIC) at LGU on December 1, 2016 and recognized by HEC 27th August 2018, marked a significant milestone in fostering a culture of research and innovation within the institution. This dedicated unit plays a pivotal role in facilitating and supporting research endeavors, promoting innovation, and bridging the gap between academia and industry. Since its inception, ORIC at LGU has become a hub for fostering collaboration, encouraging academic pursuits, and driving the translation of research outcomes into real-world applications. The establishment of ORIC reflects the institution’s commitment to advancing knowledge, promoting cutting-edge research, and contributing to societal development through the practical application of innovative ideas.
Objective of ORIC
To enable faculty members and scholars to promote their research at national and international levels.
To address industrial and economic challenges by aligning research with current issues and developing effective solutions.
To enhance innovation and creativity by encouraging innovative research among faculty and students.
To strengthen collaborations by establishing partnerships with industry, government agencies, and research institutions.
Functions of ORIC
To promote research culture & high-quality research at LGU.
To facilitate Publication, Accreditation, Printing and Indexing of LGU Research Journals.
To identify and inform the faculty members of research opportunities.
To provide technical support to faculty members for all research related activities.
To manage and protect the intellectual property (IP) generated through research and innovation
HEC Ranking of ORIC
In an outstanding achievement, ORIC-LGU secured 5th position (X-Category) among 77 ORICs in 2023. This accomplishment not only highlights ORIC-LGU’s commitment to excellence in research, innovation, and commercialization but also strengthens its position as a leading institution contributing significantly to the academic and research landscape in the country. The achievement reflects the collective dedication and hard work of the ORIC-LGU team, highlighting their commitment to advancing knowledge and fostering innovation within the academic community. The ranking of ORIC in HEC ORIC Score cards are listed below.

text:
ORIC Director’s Message – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
ORIC Director’s Message
LGU
2025-03-04T05:50:06+00:00
Director’s Message
Lahore Garrison University (LGU) is an internationally recognized institute of higher education, research, outreach and advocacy. The Office of Research, Innovation and Commercialization (ORIC) is a focal office of the university, which works for managing and expanding the research programs and linking them with industry and civil society by translating research outcomes into products and services. The ORIC also ensures that quality of research should reflect the highest international educational and research standards matching with the world’s best universities. The ORIC manages university rankings and harnesses opportunities for hunting and diversifying research grants. The office promotes faculty interaction for cutting edge multidisciplinary research and bringing research to public benefit. The office facilitates and engages with the postgraduate students and faculty for project proposal write-ups, budgetary planning, preparation of technical progress and financial reports, internal and external monitoring, scholarly publications and patent registration.
Under Academia Industry Linkages, the ORIC coordinates for national and international internship of students, promotes entrepreneurship, technology transfer and product commercialization, and organizes Business Plan Competitions to engage with industry and enroll business startups. The ORIC is also involved in outreach activities through technology display at various Expos and relevant national forums.
Dr. Tahir Alyas

title: Overview IT – Lahore Garrison University
text:
Overview IT – Lahore Garrison University
Skip to content
Overview IT
LGU
2025-01-13T18:29:27+00:00
Programme overview and scope:
The department of Information Technology (IT) is offering a two-year Master of Science in Information Technology (MSIT) program. The aim of this program is to focus on training students in the core concepts of IT, computing and business so graduates can develop successful careers in management positions that require deep technical skills. The coursework is designed to meet the needs of students who want to build a strong background in information systems and the application of information and communications technology in business. Given today’s ubiquitous computing, organizations have a critical need for people who understand, in depth, both computers and business. The program is intended to produce successful technology leaders who possess deep expertise in technology and business strategy.
Program Objectives:
The main objectives of MSIT degree program are:
To enhance students’ understanding and expertise in core and emerging areas of IT through specialized courses that integrate theoretical concepts with hands-on practical applications.
To foster analytical and innovative thinking, enabling students to design and implement effective solutions for complex, real-world IT problems.
To equip students with exceptional communication, leadership, and collaboration skills, preparing them for dynamic roles in diverse business and technology environments.
To cultivate strong research capabilities, empowering students to contribute meaningfully to cutting-edge advancements and address challenges in IT and related disciplines.
To prepare students for doctoral studies and advanced research in IT and allied technologies.
Learning Outcomes:
After the completion of degree students will be able:
Application of Knowledge:
To effectively apply advanced IT knowledge and methodologies to develop innovative solutions that address practical challenges across diverse industries.
Critical Evaluation and System Improvement:
To critically evaluate existing IT systems, technologies, and methodologies to identify weaknesses and propose improvements for enhanced efficiency and effectiveness.
Research and Innovation:
To conduct in-depth research to identify gaps in IT literature, contribute original insights, and design innovative solutions to address emerging challenges in the field.
Teamwork and Leadership:
To collaborate effectively in multidisciplinary teams, demonstrating leadership, adaptability, and professionalism in solving IT-related problems.
Ethics and Professional Responsibility:
To exhibit a strong understanding of ethical considerations, legal responsibilities, and the societal impact of IT, ensuring accountability and responsible practice as IT professionals or researchers.
Career prospects
Over the last few decades there has been tremendous growth in IT, which has almost revolutionized the very outlook of the world. The projected demand for trained IT professionals indicates a clear imbalance between the demand and supply of IT professionals with the result that this sector offers one of the highest remuneration packages. The various types of job functions available in a typical net-based environment would be content development, graphic designing, e-commerce, strategic planning, and business development and so on.
